name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: please
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | I'll keep this brief.

**I 'm just FIVE hours away from my must-hit Mid Month deadline, and the stakes couldn't be higher.**

\-- Republicans are breaking fundraising records left and right.
\-- They've already outraised and outspent my Democrats earlier this year.
\-- And they only need to flip five seats to DEFEAT our House Majority.

That's why I'm asking for your help before my deadline expires in just FIVE hours.

**Will you rush in an immediate $3 before my deadline to defend our House Majority and stop this Republican momentum in its tracks?**

| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Chip in $1 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_)**

**[Chip in $35 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-)**

**[Chip in $250 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-k-)**

**[Or chip in another amount>>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

Nancy

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45309510&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA0MzY2MjAxNwS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45309510&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA0MzY2MjAxNwS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

[[BE THE FIRST CRESCO DEMOCRAT TO RESPOND]]]() | | | | Look, conservatives are demanding Donald Trump win the NOBEL PEACE PRIZE. [We need to hear from at least [11] local Democrats by 11:59 PM:]() | | | | | Trump spent his entire presidency undermining our democracy. He spread lies about COVID-19, costing Americans their lives He separated thousands of children from their families at the border And he launched attacks to defund the Affordable Care Act, Medicare, Social Security, and the Post Office -- Thanks for responding! \-- Ruiz, Research Team | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? name: John Fetterman
subject: What's holding the Senate worth to you, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
If you think saving our Senate majority is worth a modest donation, please take a moment to contribute before midnight.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210715-2012-header&t=1&akid=2012%2E434096%2EAB5XzY)
Peter,
I'll just ask one final time before tonight's deadline:
[**_Will you donate any amount you can spare before tonight's mid-month deadline? We're incredibly close to reaching a record-breaking 250,000 small-dollar contributions, so truly, even a buck will make a difference._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22270?refcode=em20210715-2012&t=2&akid=2012%2E434096%2EAB5XzY)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22270?refcode=em20210715-2012&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2012%2E434096%2EAB5XzY)**
Reporters, pundits, our opponents, and the flag police are all laser-focused on how much money we raise.
**But in my book, the number of grassroots contributions our campaign receives from working folks like you is a hell of a lot more important.**
It's going to take a truly *massive* grassroots movement to organize in all 67 counties in Pennsylvania — but I have never been more optimistic that we're on track to make history and build the strong, honest, and inclusive campaign that will flip this seat in 2022.
[**_This race could _literally_ decide control of the Senate in 2022, so if you think saving our Senate majority is worth a modest donation to our campaign, please take a moment to chip in before midnight._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22270?refcode=em20210715-2012&t=22&akid=2012%2E434096%2EAB5XzY)
There isn't a day that goes by that I'm not reminded of just how special the campaign we're building together really is.
Thank you for everything, Peter. 😭
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210715-2012-footer&t=23&refcode2=2012_434096_AB5XzY&akid=2012%2E434096%2EAB5XzY)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=2012%2E434096%2EAB5XzY)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2012%2E434096%2EAB5XzY)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

But in my book, the number of grassroots contributions our campaign receives from working folks like you is a hell of a lot more important. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: White House is "Flagging" Facebook Posts
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=white_house_is_flagging_fb&n=1)
---
July 15th, 2021
## White House is "Flagging" Facebook Posts
Peter, the Biden White House just admitted to stomping on your free speech rights that are protected by the First Amendment. In a press conference, Jen Psaki talked about combating what they deem as "disinformation" and stated they are "flagging problematic posts for Facebook". Don't share their views on masks, ivermectin, or getting the vaccine? Your social media posts could be taken down by the President. THIS IS OUTRAGEOUS! Watch the video: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6oiei52nUpL_6MSr3MiS1Qt1G2mrBSb6WU02LCgtGNDJafKHLELbjH4LJLP3LFdSiBBaxGwSX4NducIRxX5m31A&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=white_house_is_flagging_fb&n=2) **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** [**action4liberty.com**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=vJzsGDqiixqCUhiH9Q9jjaye9n2446FS2SXLeU0SLh0&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=white_house_is_flagging_fb&n=3)

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Summer Fun in the 5th!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
PeterIt has been an amazing summer so far out and about in Wisconsin! I have really enjoyed connecting with people in person again, and hearing from so many folks at parades, at local festivals and fairs, farmers markets, brat frys, and other events.Whether it has been Sussex Lions Days, the Waukesha, West Bend and Oconomowoc 4th of July Parades, the Monche Chicken Cookout, or at Action in Jackson car show, at every stop, I'm getting great feedback and hearing frustration about what's happening in Washington.Higher gas prices. Inflation. Biden's crisis at the border. Defunding the police. Socialism, and the Democrats trying to nationalize our elections to put THEMSELVES in control! Here's what I've told everyone who shares that frustration - I'm working hard for you in DC and **we're only FIVE seats away from taking back the majority.** There is hope in sight!I look forward to attending as many events as possible yet this summer in the 5th Congressional District. I hope I run into all of you soon! name: Larry Elder
subject: What happened to the California dream?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57947445:JTF9XflmN:m:1:3253819041:80B7816163844BF5895EDA3E4646E16F:r)

---
Peter,

My name is Larry Elder and I'm a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I'm a proud Californian.

But I can't stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - **which is why I 'm announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election!**

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57947445:JTF9XflmN:m:1:3253819041:80B7816163844BF5895EDA3E4646E16F:r)
My high school-dropout father worked TWO full time jobs as a janitor in Los Angeles. But he was a hard worker, he saved his nickels and dimes until he could buy us a house in South Central Los Angeles.

At that time, **this was the American dream and California was where people came to achieve it.** Now, our over-reaching, leftist dominated government has made this dream nearly **impossible to achieve.**

Today's California is a sad state of affairs. **Our taxes are rising almost as fast as our crime rates, and our homeless population accounts for 25% of the whole country 's and only is growing under a Democrat dominated government.** [**We must end the Democrats ' full control of our state before it's too late, Peter. Can I count in you to help me do that?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57947445:JTF9XflmN:m:1:3253819041:80B7816163844BF5895EDA3E4646E16F:r)

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57947445:JTF9XflmN:m:1:3253819041:80B7816163844BF5895EDA3E4646E16F:r)
Enough is enough, and I refuse to watch while Gavin Newsom ruins our state with abusive executive order after executive order. His draconian control has gone too far!

During the pandemic, he dined for $35,000 at the French Laundry without a mask with the same health officials and lobbyists that imposed the shutdown! **Meanwhile businesses he didn 't frequent weren't allowed to stay open. He shut down in-school learning while his own children enjoyed the luxury of private in-school instruction.**

I'm absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom's failed Democrat-led dictatorship. **Our businesses should be open, our schools should be open. Opportunity doesn 't come from prolonged covid stimulus that should have ended months ago. It is forged in a thriving and free economy and top-notch schools - neither of which exists in California under Newsom.**

Peter, I know that I have what it takes to restore California to its former state of bountiful opportunity, but I'm going to need you on my team every step of the way. With only a short amount of time remaining until the election, [**will you join my team?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57947445:JTF9XflmN:m:1:3253819041:80B7816163844BF5895EDA3E4646E16F:r)

[**California is in desperate need of strong, common-sense conservative leadership right now and I 'm willing to step up to the plate to help stop Gavin Newsom from further destroying California. Are you with me?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57947445:JTF9XflmN:m:1:3253819041:80B7816163844BF5895EDA3E4646E16F:r)

Thank you,

Larry Elder

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57947445:JTF9XflmN:m:1:3253819041:80B7816163844BF5895EDA3E4646E16F:r)

| | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
---

Because the NRCC and right-wing groups are terrified that Ron is going to win this seat again! They're willing to say and do anything to keep us from winning and moving Wisconsin forward, but we can stop them. = The race for WI-03 is one of the most competitive in the country, which means Ron will continue to be one of their top targets! It's only going to get worse, unless we fight back! = | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = = | = = | = = | | = = | = = | = = | | | | Bottom line, we have to fight back as a team. Because no matter how much we move Wisconsin and our country forward for everyone, they have made it crystal clear they will try to stop us and take us back. We won't let that happen! = We're ready for the battle ahead because we have you on our team, and we can't tell you enough how much that means to us. Fighting Forward , Team Kind | | | | | | | = = | | | | To learn more about Ron Kind and moving Wisconsin forward visit . Emails are the best way to stay updated on our campaign but if you wish .

There is still more work to do. Take action → | Our families are celebrating a huge victory, Peter. Biden’s first expanded Child Tax Credit payment just went out to families. This is a defining moment for the Biden Administration. This policy — granting families up to $300 per month for each child — is life-changing for millions of Americans. **Reports estimate it will lift _4.1 MILLION_ children out of poverty.** Biden removed barriers from the Child Tax Credit, ensuring all children and families who needed this assistance are eligible. Before this extension, half of all Black and Latino children were unable to receive the full tax credit. But this isn’t where the fight stops. President Biden and his congressional allies are fighting to make this policy permanent to ensure all families can thrive in our country. It might not be an election year, but the work to protect our democracy never stops. Here at Never Again PAC, we're working to lay the foundation to replace the most radical and dangerous Republicans in Congress next election and replace them with leaders who will protect our cherished democratic values. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32489053/295926773/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiMmExNzIxLTNlZTYtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B73U_dZb930Ce3p7NoY6_CzRXxzRi2OxXb7Qqley3yI=&emci=9a2fcdbd-1ce4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0b2a1721-3ee6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16335001) _Never Again PAC is working to hold the most dangerous elected officials accountable for their attacks on our democracy and we're counting on supporters like you to help us do it. If you'd rather not hear from our team, you can[unsubscribe](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/9a2fcdbd-1ce4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/0b2a1721-3ee6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiMmExNzIxLTNlZTYtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B73U_dZb930Ce3p7NoY6_CzRXxzRi2OxXb7Qqley3yI=&id=117934094) now._ Team,

It might not be an election year, but the work to protect our democracy never stops. Here at Never Again PAC, we're working to lay the foundation to replace the most radical and dangerous Republicans in Congress next election and replace them with leaders who will protect our cherished democratic values.

Over the coming months, we'll be holding the members of Congress who voted to overturn the results of a free and fair election accountable for their actions and sending them a message that the American people won't stand for their attacks on our democracy.

Our work is just getting started, and we don't want you to miss a thing. name: re: tax the rich -- Left Action
subject: Sign the Petition: "Make the wealthy pay their fair share"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect Sonia Chang-D iaz)_
body:
Join this candidate for governor in calling for the wealthy to pay their fair share
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
# [Sign on: "Raise Taxes on the Rich"](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tde96c966-59ef-4974-922f-c15f582dca46/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
_***BREAKING: The movement to make the wealthy pay their fair share is growing! Sonia Chang-D iaz, candidate for governor of Massachusetts, is promoting a "Fair Share Amendment" to make this happen (see her letter below). **[Show your support!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfe7490ee-4a6e-4db3-836c-3838efc404ec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**_
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T721c5864-cadf-4be4-bf5e-7f4972f6225c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Friend, I’d be lying if I said I was surprised. A new report from ProPublica shows the most well-off billionaires in our country -- think Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos, and Mike Bloomberg -- **[paid nothing or next to nothing in federal income taxes](https://default.salsalabs.org/T131f7d80-9a51-4b64-bda6-22c5a3de2603/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**. And here at home, there are more millionaires living in Massachusetts than in 46 other states. Each one of them pays the exact same state tax rate as working class families trying to make ends meet. [Can you help us win the fight for fair taxes in Massachusetts? Add your name if you agree: It’s time for millionaires to pay their fair share in Massachusetts. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d621d9b-366a-4517-9cbc-6a7f7a498cd3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We have the chance to lead on this issue today. The legislature has voted to put a constitutional amendment on the ballot to raise taxes on incomes over $1 million -- and we’ll need to join together as a people-powered movement to approve it on election day. If we win the Fair Share Amendment, our state will be able to invest nearly $2 billion in quality education for every child and to fix our state’s crumbling infrastructure. [So I’m asking: please add your name if you support raising taxes on the wealthiest in our state and making critical investments in education and transportation.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3ef6bd55-4c3b-4475-a6cb-6acf2c4c02d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for standing up for equity and justice in our state. Saludos, Sonia
---
| | | | [CLICK TO SIGN PETITION](https://default.salsalabs.org/T50e9f69e-ce59-4f25-bc4c-5b63c06d8d47/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | Thanks again for taking action, and helping fight back! LeftAction Team _(Paid for by the Committee to Elect Sonia Chang-D iaz)_
---
|
---

---|---|---

name: Max Flugrath
subject: Stop me if you’ve seen this before
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends—

In case you haven’t seen it, the new DeSantis merch store looks... familiar. Take a look:

DeSantis acts like Trump, “governs” like Trump, and even made his logo *look* just like Trump’s. We imagine his 2024 Presidential campaign will look very similar.

Florida deserves better than a dangerous, far-right copycat like DeSantis. Click here to chip in now and help us stop him next year. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/edesantismerch]

DeSantis’ merch store isn’t just sad — it also shows how dangerous he is. His “Don’t Fauci My Florida” cupholders show just how little he cares about science, public health, and the well-being of Floridians.

And his continued allegiance to Trump shows how little he cares about our democracy.

Team, we need your help to stop Trumpism in Florida and make DeSantis a one-term governor. If you’re all in on this fight, please click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/edesantismerch]

Thanks,

Max Flugrath
Communications Director

name: Walt Blackman
subject: they’re openly indoctrinating our children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walt Blackman for Congress |
body:
| |
---
|
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57953722:6xn3jMlND:m:1:3253819041:6D2B328A38F0BC25B6FAEFA04FB1DEAA:r)
|
---
Hi Peter, I'm Walt Blackman, I'm a Combat Veteran, a Conservative Patriot, and I'm running for Congress in Arizona's 1st Congressional District.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57953722:6xn3jMlND:m:1:3253819041:6D2B328A38F0BC25B6FAEFA04FB1DEAA:r)

I'm bringing this story from _the Daily Wire_ to the attention of every conservative and patriotic American.

⬇⬇⬇
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57953722:6xn3jMlND:m:1:3253819041:6D2B328A38F0BC25B6FAEFA04FB1DEAA:r)
This is very disturbing news, Peter. Teacher unions are holding our schools, teachers, and children hostage with this dangerous ideology.

If you're not sure what Critical Race Theory is and why is it so bad for America's children, I'll do a quick rundown:

**-> It teaches only the bad in American history, never the good. **
**-> It tries to sow division of Americans by race, just as Marxism divided by class. **
**-> It indoctrinates our children with anti-American propaganda. **
[**Defeat Critical Race Theory: Rush A Donation Now**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57953722:6xn3jMlND:m:1:3253819041:6D2B328A38F0BC25B6FAEFA04FB1DEAA:r)
Critical Race Theory is a way for the radical Left to brainwash our children and fill their heads with their radical agenda. _**Plain and simple.**_

**[If you agree, then rush $5 right now toward my effort to Defeat Critical Race Theory >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57953723:6xn3jMlND:m:1:3253819041:6D2B328A38F0BC25B6FAEFA04FB1DEAA:r)**
[**Defeat Critical Race Theory: Rush A Donation Now**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57953722:6xn3jMlND:m:1:3253819041:6D2B328A38F0BC25B6FAEFA04FB1DEAA:r)
_Want to hear the rest of my story? _

I served in the United States Army for nearly 22 years as a Front Line Tank Commander. I completed 7 tours of duty in some of the world's most dangerous battlefields, including Kosovo, Afghanistan, and Iraq, where I fought in the Second Battle of Fallujah, the bloodiest battle in the Iraq War.

My service earned me a Bronze Star for combat action in Iraq and a Meritorious Service Medal. But the most important thing I learned from my service was _**the true price of Freedom and how fragile it is.**_

You know Freedom means something a little different to veterans, warfighters, and combat vets.

We look at it a bit differently. When we see that flag, something burns deep inside--that burning we have is for a desire to preserve Freedom for everyone regardless of background.

_**We believe in Freedom.**_

**We don 't believe in burning down monuments...**

**We don 't believe in burning our flag... **

**We stand up for our flag!**

**And we stand up for the United States of America!**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57953722:6xn3jMlND:m:1:3253819041:6D2B328A38F0BC25B6FAEFA04FB1DEAA:r)

I'm running for Congress because I know the true price of Freedom, and I know what's at stake if we lose it.

**I 've served my country faithfully for 22 years; I hope you help me continue that service in Congress! **

**If you want to join me in my fight for Freedom, you can chip in at this secure link:****[https://secure.winred.com/walt-blackman-for-congress/action-2600500](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57953722:6xn3jMlND:m:1:3253819041:6D2B328A38F0BC25B6FAEFA04FB1DEAA:r)**

Thank you,
Walt Blackman
|
---

I 've served my country faithfully for 22 years; I hope you help me continue that service in Congress! name: Team WisGOP
subject: SIGN THE PETITION: Tell Ron Kind to put Wisconsin workers first!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58451750:WkHPXPdNL:m:1:2068296031:147F38E2153E3EA1F80870A0DC93B08C:r)
Friend,

After Joe Biden pulled a **[bait-and-switch](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58451751:WkHPXPdNL:m:1:2068296031:147F38E2153E3EA1F80870A0DC93B08C:r)** on Wisconsin farmers last month by switching the focus of his visit to the third congressional district from agriculture to electric buses, the White House has given Congressman Ron Kind a consolation prize by sending the U.S. Trade Representative to La Crosse to discuss trade policies.

[**_Add your name to our petition to tell Ron Kind and Joe Biden to put Wisconsin workers first!
_**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58451750:WkHPXPdNL:m:1:2068296031:147F38E2153E3EA1F80870A0DC93B08C:r)
Despite the Democrats' best efforts to help Kind's re-election bid by trying to pretend that Biden's slight to Wisconsin farmers didn't happen and cover up Kind's embarassing record on trade, they can't rewrite history. The fact remains that **Ron Kind has spent his 24 years in Congress choosing China over Wisconsin workers and delaying critical trade deals like the USMCA.**
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58451750:WkHPXPdNL:m:1:2068296031:147F38E2153E3EA1F80870A0DC93B08C:r)

[**Help us hold Ron Kind accountable by signing the petition now!**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58451750:WkHPXPdNL:m:1:2068296031:147F38E2153E3EA1F80870A0DC93B08C:r)

Wisconsinites in the third congressional district won't forget that Ron Kind sided with Nancy Pelosi over Wisconsin farmers when Democrats waited over a year to pass the USMCA. **Friend, we need to hold Ron Kind accountable as we prepare to defeat him in 2022. Adding your name will help us show him that he won 't be able to sweep this under the rug.**

Thanks,

Team WisGOP

* * *

**Article Spotlight:**[**How End Citizens United is Working to Protect Voting Rights**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiaHVweGZkaWFhMjZsMWxmbHNwYTIiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20veW9xT2Jjald0ay9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNzE2MjFfdGxkcl9GSU5BTFx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Washington hates America
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=55d61d4472f2446d93b08e085c0189b1&_e=kt8XkHwziK99dLfYzMzCLq-DB1FmrRWXaUW1oaXGO7dF869A5K8umN5x_3YZiSMcm9qy0l8j6RGSgzBEyvnlE3A-nHN7EtCMwfb2DWawpDkiRNGpq-1eQQcO_L3FbLqj11z8HhNWQ2hPh6J6T8KQ2nhjooWEpyV1n05cHQ48UdDslY3jTLKz7y0B4hN3aH4sfdPMBB06DF9ARKDajwyoqiZPXEHNM4MLCP1PUzLuiQnMS2YBhGAk0q-uejXmPndaKIebrVVT-v5cEDpfZ4NZj2fxkqb4c6y-tMVA6rECukJ8Wsr2EVeleF9VyzJDhDGk1VafhyhdPBbgQXmJY9_SxhVeEregOvlZBrMxNPL4ekA67j8l--sXWDu3UEsQU5E1) Fellow American, Washington’s hatred of Real America is disgusting. The Swamp thinks the values you and I share are hopelessly backward, even “deplorable.” But do you know what? I’m proud to cling to my Bible, my Constitutional rights, and my belief that America is the greatest country in the history of the world. **If you love America and are proud to wear that love on your sleeve, I want to know what you think of The Washington Swamp, which engorges itself on trillions of tax dollars extracted from the American Heartland. ** [**> >> Click on this short survey to let me know your thoughts about The Swamp. >>>**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=55d61d4472f2446d93b08e085c0189b1&_e=kt8XkHwziK99dLfYzMzCLq-DB1FmrRWXaUW1oaXGO7dF869A5K8umN5x_3YZiSMcm9qy0l8j6RGSgzBEyvnlE3A-nHN7EtCMwfb2DWawpDkiRNGpq-1eQQcO_L3FbLqj11z8HhNWQ2hPh6J6T8KQ2nhjooWEpyV1n05cHQ48UdCDsDwaAsu1Q2HmxcImfhQYOUtsjoRoSdt1yjWjSSI1tV3_Ox7X8ok1T53q6hY-iZtkQV6MVp1aj3uMu8AgxdWefzoBju81iQm-69MtnFZWbJYg_sg5AKHBZVLJj_mcGOnvN3bQxfL33zvJJ1jhdinK-zb5CIAJhiWKfh63qHCK3StJBBJlz1SCPU7HI7x5QCDU7RticXKxQZhHyl5fbgnC) [**Tell me honestly, what do you think of the corruption in Washington?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=55d61d4472f2446d93b08e085c0189b1&_e=kt8XkHwziK99dLfYzMzCLq-DB1FmrRWXaUW1oaXGO7dF869A5K8umN5x_3YZiSMcm9qy0l8j6RGSgzBEyvnlE3A-nHN7EtCMwfb2DWawpDkiRNGpq-1eQQcO_L3FbLqj11z8HhNWQ2hPh6J6T8KQ2nhjooWEpyV1n05cHQ48UdDgyjjEHQaFonpwo5bL-HLpPN5lat4FzzO5dHJPYzPtDFYGvi-NeHOiZ2zY6IE3aUKLno_IKE9ssPe1UpVBMvHoY1M9DcRWpT-mCIyhd0z4j3TpJGoI9zZ0JbDKOIFdsEkBy9pfrnTQxd6NW2FNT6YQliA3ctZ52KebJX2ta0Es8xzBYou2jLfx7Q51kH3ahW-smtrx8cJzHszqpMCVypmV) Last year, Congress spent their time investigating and impeaching President Trump instead of doing the people’s work ... or any work at all! Meanwhile, in Real America, you’ll see farms, factories, small-town storefronts, and more — _a real economy supporting the lives of real people_. The Swamp is desperately out of touch with the American mainstream. Not surprisingly, eight of America’s ten wealthiest counties are clustered right around the nation’s capital ... that’s what is truly deplorable. [**> >> I know where I stand on The Swamp, but I want to hear your opinion. Does Washington hate Real America? >>>**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=55d61d4472f2446d93b08e085c0189b1&_e=kt8XkHwziK99dLfYzMzCLq-DB1FmrRWXaUW1oaXGO7dF869A5K8umN5x_3YZiSMcm9qy0l8j6RGSgzBEyvnlE3A-nHN7EtCMwfb2DWawpDkiRNGpq-1eQQcO_L3FbLqj11z8HhNWQ2hPh6J6T8KQ2nhjooWEpyV1n05cHQ48UdBoBcSBvMoEFxWH_lB0wiQBMtFOiwhCvOpifGc9gvLTmqh-obd1qeeQPa1-kkPpvNswnGIqtJ5mtPQsXbs4n7WOUxRdA4jQIyHq6dKxLnmCzITNzzBBVJt3VWbrfu3bF1cxs5pgLbgNNg61LBSFEvamcCdxhzNQESUy6PYRoi0syPS9ppNnQeZynKcyqQGwb2XCjdssmfGUdtpk_Sj6uMwl) **Please send me your personal comments on The Swamp — and unlike Swamp Creatures, I really do want to hear from YOU.** I’ll be checking in tonight to read your responses. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---

name: BLUE SENATE UPDATE (via maggiehassan.com)
subject: Tom Cotton is coming to town
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
**“I'll be in New Hampshire this weekend, because New Hampshire will once again be the center of the political universe with one of America's most hotly contested Senate races.”** – Tom Cotton BREAKING: Far-right Republican Senator Tom Cotton is coming to New Hampshire _this weekend_ to headline a major GOP fundraiser. He said so himself: **this Senate race will be one of the most contested in the country.** Maggie Hassan is the most vulnerable Democrat running for reelection in 2022 -- and the GOP knows it. Tom Cotton is just the latest in a swarm of national Republicans who are descending upon New Hampshire. That’s why we’ve set an emergency goal of 1,000 grassroots contributions before Tom Cotton lands in New Hampshire. **[You’re one of our top supporters, so can you rush $5 or whatever you can today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32500764/295967029/1018596853?refcode=e20210716_bsu-cotton-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGFhOTBlOC01M2U2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BrSqvrdUSlwbLx1Cel_0cJZW6rL77PGOMoF4mNCU_cw=)** | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32500765/295967030/1018596853?refcode=e20210716_bsu-cotton-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGFhOTBlOC01M2U2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BrSqvrdUSlwbLx1Cel_0cJZW6rL77PGOMoF4mNCU_cw=)

name: Walt Blackman | AZ Conservative
subject: Why Kamala Harris won’t go to the Border :arrow_down:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walt Blackman for Congress |
body:
My name is Walt Blackman, I'm a combat veteran, a conservative Patriot, and I'm running for Congress in Arizona's 2nd Congressional District. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c208%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=RGjmIeoxlSHLdKwxD1EdEg&sysid=1)
| |
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4047%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uZFlZH4zDoikpMeX5pFqEQ&sysid=1)
|
---
Hi friend,

My name is Walt Blackman, I'm a combat veteran, a conservative Patriot, and I'm running for Congress in Arizona's 2nd Congressional District.

I was recently on _Newsmax_ calling out Kamala Harris for the open border anarchy unfolding at our southern borderー _[**Check it out now >>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4048%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UKSz7LJgvmCSMb6W%2bHddmQ&sysid=1)_
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4049%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oT7MGKDeXIgCfmEILYS4hA&sysid=1)
[**WATCH THE CLIP**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4040%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VGYQcqMdmhnfbsIhUDu34g&sysid=1)
Friend, I've been to the border, and I've seen this crisis with my own eyes, and let me tell you, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden have made this situation **a clear and present danger to our country!**
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4047%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uZFlZH4zDoikpMeX5pFqEQ&sysid=1)
Being from Arizona, living near the border, I can tell you what's really happening down here:
→ U.S. Border Patrol is completely **_OVERWHELMED. _**
→ There are **_3,000_** **_ILLEGAL CROSSINGS_** per day.
→ We **_CAN'T CONTROL_** who is coming into our country.

** ****_"Without borders, we don't have a country"_**_\- President Trump._
[**DEFEND AMERICA'S BORDERS**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4041%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9ZuM916HnJsotYMLlztOKA&sysid=1)
President Trump was exactly right. And that's exactly the kind of mess that Biden and Harris have created here in Arizona.

**That's why I'm running for Congress to defend America's borders, just like I defended our country abroad. **

**__[Help send me to Congress to Defend America's Borders by DONATING to my fight NOW >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4042%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L%2by68AqJQ4V%2fkifxNuBhLw&sysid=1)__**
_Want to hear the rest of my story? _
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4043%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gumLX58XGOXlYEMz3BQU4Q&sysid=1)
I served in the United States Army for nearly 22 years as a Front Line Tank Commander. I completed 7 tours of duty in some of the world's most dangerous battlefields, including Kosovo, Afghanistan, and Iraq, where I fought in the Second Battle of Fallujah, the bloodiest battle in the Iraq War.
My service earned me a Bronze Star for combat action in Iraq and a Meritorious Service Medal. But the most important thing I learned from my service was _**the true price of Freedom and how fragile it is.**_

You know Freedom means something a little different to veterans, warfighters, and combat vets.

We look at it a bit differently. When we see that flag, something burns deep inside--that burning we have is for a desire to preserve Freedom for everyone regardless of background.

_**We believe in Freedom.**_

**We don't believe in burning down monuments...**

**We don't believe in burning our flag... **

**We stand up for our flag!**

**And we stand up for the United States of America!**
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4047%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uZFlZH4zDoikpMeX5pFqEQ&sysid=1)
I'm running for Congress because I know the true price of Freedom, and I know what's at stake if we lose it.

**I've served my country faithfully for 22 years; I hope you help me continue that service in Congress! **

**If you want to join me in my fight for Freedom, you can chip in at this secure link:****_[https://secure.winred.com/walt-blackman-for-congress/action-2491200/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4044%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mFeIFOriENj1e%2fpF0eVqig&sysid=1)_**

Thank you,
Walt Blackman
|
---

clean_body: My name is Walt Blackman, I'm a combat veteran, a conservative Patriot, and I'm running for Congress in Arizona's 2nd Congressional District. | | | Hi friend, My name is Walt Blackman, I'm a combat veteran, a conservative Patriot, and I'm running for Congress in Arizona's 2nd Congressional District. I was recently on Newsmax calling out Kamala Harris for the open border anarchy unfolding at our southern borderー Friend, I've been to the border, and I've seen this crisis with my own eyes, and let me tell you, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden have made this situation a clear and present danger to our country! Being from Arizona, living near the border, I can tell you what's really happening down here: → U.S. Border Patrol is completely OVERWHELMED. → There are 3,000 ILLEGAL CROSSINGS per day. → We CAN'T CONTROL who is coming into our country. "Without borders, we don't have a country"\- President Trump. President Trump was exactly right. And that's exactly the kind of mess that Biden and Harris have created here in Arizona. That's why I'm running for Congress to defend America's borders, just like I defended our country abroad. Want to hear the rest of my story? I served in the United States Army for nearly 22 years as a Front Line Tank Commander. I completed 7 tours of duty in some of the world's most dangerous battlefields, including Kosovo, Afghanistan, and Iraq, where I fought in the Second Battle of Fallujah, the bloodiest battle in the Iraq War. My service earned me a Bronze Star for combat action in Iraq and a Meritorious Service Medal. But the most important thing I learned from my service was the true price of Freedom and how fragile it is. You know Freedom means something a little different to veterans, warfighters, and combat vets. We look at it a bit differently. When we see that flag, something burns deep inside--that burning we have is for a desire to preserve Freedom for everyone regardless of background. We believe in Freedom. We don't believe in burning down monuments... We don't believe in burning our flag... We stand up for our flag! And we stand up for the United States of America! I'm running for Congress because I know the true price of Freedom, and I know what's at stake if we lose it. I've served my country faithfully for 22 years; I hope you help me continue that service in Congress! If you want to join me in my fight for Freedom, you can chip in at this secure link: Thank you, Walt Blackman | Pictures taken in uniform while Walt was in active service does not imply DOD or military endorsement. | | | Paid for by Walt Blackman for Congress | 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314 _

Friend,

**Arizona will be the TOP battleground in 2022 – and if we're going to flip it blue, I need your help. **While failed Republicans like Doug Ducey and Kelli Ward are busy enacting their extremist agenda to attack voting rights, spread conspiracies about the 2020 election and keep Arizona red, I'm building a people-powered movement to flip the governorship blue and build a state that works for _all_ of our people.
Experts at Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight are calling this race a _toss-up –_ which means for the first time in years, Democrats have a real chance to win. But now, POLITICO reports that Republicans will spend MILLIONS to try to buy this seat – and while the GOP is relying on their megadonors to keep this battleground red, we're running a grassroots campaign to give power _back_ to the people.
**And unfortunately, with time running out before our critical mid-month deadline, we're still falling dangerously short of our $15,000 goal. Everything from voting rights to affordable health care to good-paying jobs is on the line in this race, so I have to ask: **
[**Please, friend, will you rush $5 or more now – before our critical mid-month deadline – to power our campaign to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona blue? Donating today is about more than just a dollar amount – it's about joining our grassroots movement to create a better future for our children.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32500919/295967741/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk136-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWNmZDU3Ni01NGU2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PFFJaoR_gXkAQQ2RvSXplmVYnkTaUNtkBxSMDFEBsBA=)
This fight is urgent for all Arizonans, but it's personal for me, too. I'm a proud child of immigrants, and my parents taught me that if I work hard and dream big, anything is possible.

I've chosen to dedicate my life to making that dream real for others, too. I've brought people together to collaborate for the common good, solving big problems everywhere from my hometown, where I served as mayor, to the Obama administration.
But what we've learned from failed Republicans like Doug Ducey and Kelli Ward is that not everyone wants to solve problems. Some would rather divide us than tackle the real problems facing our state. **I'm running to be the kind of governor Ducey has utterly failed to be: to put an end to GOP corruption and build a state that works for _all_ of our people. But I need your help, especially with our next deadline looming. So I have to ask:**
**[Will you give $5 or more right now to help us reach our must-hit mid-month goal before the deadline? Every dollar will fuel our people-powered movement to defeat GOP extremism, flip Arizona blue and restore the promise of our great state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32500920/295967742/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk136-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWNmZDU3Ni01NGU2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PFFJaoR_gXkAQQ2RvSXplmVYnkTaUNtkBxSMDFEBsBA=)**
Thanks for joining me in this fight.

Marco Lopez
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32500921/295967743/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk136-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWNmZDU3Ni01NGU2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PFFJaoR_gXkAQQ2RvSXplmVYnkTaUNtkBxSMDFEBsBA=) Thank you so much.

body:
Next Friday, July 23, we will celebrate the graduation of the inaugural class of our Indiana Republican Party Diversity Leadership Series. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470698?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Graduation Time**_ Next Friday, July 23, we will celebrate the graduation of the inaugural class of our Indiana Republican Party Diversity Leadership Series. Republican National Committee Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel and Governor Eric Holcomb will join us that afternoon and deliver remarks to the class. Your Indiana Republican Party is leading efforts to grow our party. We are the first state party to have a series specifically focused on growing our party among traditionally underrepresented communities across the state. Our series is being talked about nationally and others states looking to replicate. I hope you can join us for this first-ever graduation luncheon. Details on tickets and sponsorship opportunities are below. Thanks,

Kyle

**_Photo:_**_ __Chairman Hupfer speaking to the inaugural class of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series_
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| **_Governor Holcomb's Statement on Close of 2021 Fiscal Year_**
_**"Because of the strong position Indiana occupied going into last year’s unprecedented global pandemic and partnerships at all levels of government, we now find ourselves at a place of full employment and growing economy. State fiscal leaders deserve high praise for closely monitoring financial forecasts and then quickly adapting to the facts on Main Street, Indiana.**_ **_We quickly pivoted from managing through a once anticipated recession due to the ramifications of the COVID-19 pandemic to closing the state fiscal year with $3.9 billion in combined reserves. Now, with our 19th straight balanced budget, we are working on everything from mental health programs and health care supports to record increases in K-12 tuition support. We’re investing in state public facilities and infrastructure projects statewide on a level never seen before all the while doing everything we can to create a highly skilled workforce to fill the open jobs of today and tomorrow._** **_Thanks to everyone’s diligent approach, including a bullish private sector, Indiana is positioned to begin the 2022 state fiscal year in a strong financial position that will benefit Hoosiers for years to come."_**
---
|
---
| _**What They're Saying: Close of 2021 Fiscal Year**_
_**“This afternoon’s budget announcement is good news for all Hoosiers. Governor Holcomb’s leadership through the pandemic and conservative fiscal management over the last several years allowed Indiana to come roaring back stronger than ever and the increase in state revenues shows that our economy, under Republican leadership, is incredibly strong. In Indiana, we’re making record investments in education, workforce training, infrastructure and quality of life while keeping our taxes low and our budgets balanced. On top of all of that, Hoosier taxpayers will now receive an automatic tax credit. Thank you to Governor Holcomb and all the fiscal and legislative leaders that worked so hard to make news like today’s possible.” -Chairman Kyle Hupfer

“As the former Auditor of State of Indiana, I’m elated to see the 2021 fiscal year close with $3.9 billion in our reserves. Our current Auditor of State, Tera Klutz, along with fiscal leaders in the State Budget Agency, General Assembly, and throughout state government deserve praise for being good stewards of the taxpayer dollar. I’m happy to see a portion of this reserve being credited to Hoosiers.”-Lt Gov. Suzanne Crouch

“Indiana once again exceeded expectations and soared through the recession with one of the fastest recoveries on record to end with a cash reserve of $3.9 billion at the end of June. Indiana is poised to make an excess reserve transfer of $1.1 billion, which will be split between retirement funding and a refundable income tax credit for Hoosier taxpayers. Indiana’s economic future and fiscal responsibility are directly linked. Maintaining sustainable finances creates a better, stronger, more prosperous Hoosier state for the next generation.”-Auditor Tera Klutz

“Thanks to the resilience of our Hoosier workers, Indiana's economy has bounced back faster than most other states in the country. It's rare for government to return money to taxpayers, but with the automatic taxpayer refund kicking in, that's exactly what our state is doing, and I am pleased we are in a position to return some of that hard-earned money. At the same time, we continue to eliminate massive amounts of debt in the way of paying down our pension obligations, which will free up millions of dollars down the road for our state's future leaders to reinvest in Hoosiers. This is what sound fiscal policy looks like, and my caucus members and I are committed to continuing this kind of leadership now and in the future." -Senate President Pro Tem Rodric Bray

“Today’s fiscal year closeout results demonstrate that the fundamentally strong Hoosier economy has picked up where it left off after the initial shock of the pandemic and revenues continue to surge beyond our expectations. The automatic taxpayer refund ensures that reserves beyond what's needed go back to where they belong – in the pockets of hardworking Hoosiers. Indiana's already provided record funding for our K-12 schools and a fully funded infrastructure improvement plan on top of paying down debt, so this taxpayer refund is well-deserved. As I've said before, we're going to jump at the chance to explore sustainable tax cuts and reforms next session. It's critical for us to build on this record-breaking momentum and continue to do what's right by taxpayers. We're fortunate to be on such strong financial footing, and that's in large part due to conservative Republican stewardship over the last 10 years." -House Speaker Todd Huston**_

**_“_**** _Republicans will always back the blue – and we hope our Democrat friends across the country can renounce the radical leaders of their party and join us in supporting the police_**** _“ -Chairman Hupfer_**
You can read his piece here: [http://indiana.gop/news/gop-chairman-hupfer-don%E2%80%99t-fall-democrat-gaslighting-police](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ee35a4e936&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **- ****July 16, 2021-** **\- Thanks American Rescue Plan: Child Tax Credits Hit Bank Accounts This Week -** Indiana Democrats have been checking partisanship at the door so we can continue to deliver for Hoosier families across Indiana. It's why Democrats were happy to pass the American Rescue Plan and begin to put COVID-19 in the rearview mirror. Hoosier families this week will once again see how Democrats delivered for them as additional relief checks hit their mailboxes to help make ends meet. Provided by the Child Tax Credit, these checks will help lift more than 80,000 Indiana children out of poverty and will deliver relief of up to $1,600 per child at a time when it is needed most. Here's what this means: Couples earning $150,000 or less or single parents that make up to $112,500 will receive this benefit. Previously, the credit had a maximum of $2000 for any child younger than 17 years of age. However, due to the Rescue Plan, the Child Tax Credit now brings a maximum of $3,600. Indiana Democrats are ready to continue this work because Hoosiers deserve a better future, not a partisan one. Let's celebrate the American Rescue Plan and push for the upcoming American Jobs Plan to become law. Democrats are primed to deliver once again for Hoosiers. **\- Indiana Republicans Taking Credit for American Rescue Plan Funds ****-** We know that Indiana and Hoosier families have a bright future ahead thanks to President Joe Biden and Democrats passing the American Rescue Plan -- a plan that not one Republican supported. **_Not a single one._** The American Rescue Plan is why Indiana is putting COVID-19 in the rearview mirror. Even though not a single Republican supported the American Rescue Plan, they are now trying to take credit for the impact it's bringing to our state. In the same breath, Republicans are still attacking Democrats for the cost of the Rescue Plan (and upcoming American Jobs Plan). Remember: under their watch, the national debt went up by $7.8 trillion -- in just four years! Indiana Republicans cannot have it both ways. Republicans did not support this responsible, common-sense agenda. Instead, Republicans are abiding by a form of extreme partisanship not seen in recent history. Indiana Republicans are taking credit for the [state budget from the 2021 legislative session](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32502791/295975486/1132797455?FFF.07.16.21=FFF.07.16.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWJjM2NmYS01OGU2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gax6AywfXYHleKngVYeY3N2NH_ubfROqSZOhMpQWNV0=&emci=6a19cf78-50e6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=41bc3cfa-58e6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535), [the state's good financial shape](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32502792/295975487/1061680129?FFF.07.16.21=FFF.07.16.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWJjM2NmYS01OGU2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gax6AywfXYHleKngVYeY3N2NH_ubfROqSZOhMpQWNV0=&emci=6a19cf78-50e6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=41bc3cfa-58e6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535), and broadband expansion and economic development projects -- but they refuse to admit the American Rescue Plan made all of this possible. As Indiana Democrats deliver for Hoosier families, we must also hold Republicans accountable for choosing their partisanship over the Rescue Plan. **\- Indiana Democrats Kick Off the American Jobs Plan Tour -** **** This past week, Indiana Democrats went back on the road again to let Hoosiers know why Indiana needs the American Jobs Plan. The pitch was simple: the Jobs Plan will create a better future for Hoosier families. The Jobs Plan is going to set Indiana up for long-term success by creating good-paying jobs that will rebuild Indiana's infrastructure and strengthen Indiana's workforce. It will revitalize VA hospitals and eliminate the childcare deserts across Indiana. The Jobs Plan will also pick up where the Rescue Plan left off by further expanding broadband internet access across the state. Indiana Democrats are ready to meet Hoosiers where they are to engage with the community. It's why Indiana Democrats are crisscrossing the state to let Hoosiers know why Indiana needs the American Jobs Plan - no matter the zip code. We're ready to build a better future and create better opportunities for our families, and we ask you to join us. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates.
* * *
Benefits
* Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process
* Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials
* Enhanced communication and organizational skills
* Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development
* This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field
* We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school.

* * *
Intern Duties Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include:
* campaign research
* voter outreach
* data entry
* assistance with local campaign events
* special projects

* * *
Qualifications Applications must be:
* passionate about Democratic politics
* trustworthy and responsible
* able to communicate effectively with others
* flexible and willing to help when needed
* able to work on multiple tasks at once

* * *
Start/End Dates and Schedule Applications for the Fall of 2021 are now being accepted until August 13, 2021 We are not currently accepting applications for the Spring of 2022. Fall interns must commit to working a minimum of 20 - 30 hours per week. The Party will be flexible on days and times, as well as start and end dates, to help accommodate class and work schedules of interns. This position has a monthly stipend but does not include travel reimbursement. Hybrid virtual/in-person opportunities are possible.
* * *
How to Apply Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at lauren@indems.org. clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | - July 16, 2021- \- Thanks American Rescue Plan: Child Tax Credits Hit Bank Accounts This Week - Indiana Democrats have been checking partisanship at the door so we can continue to deliver for Hoosier families across Indiana. It's why Democrats were happy to pass the American Rescue Plan and begin to put COVID-19 in the rearview mirror. Hoosier families this week will once again see how Democrats delivered for them as additional relief checks hit their mailboxes to help make ends meet. Provided by the Child Tax Credit, these checks will help lift more than 80,000 Indiana children out of poverty and will deliver relief of up to $1,600 per child at a time when it is needed most. Here's what this means: Couples earning $150,000 or less or single parents that make up to $112,500 will receive this benefit. Previously, the credit had a maximum of $2000 for any child younger than 17 years of age. However, due to the Rescue Plan, the Child Tax Credit now brings a maximum of $3,600. Indiana Democrats are ready to continue this work because Hoosiers deserve a better future, not a partisan one. Let's celebrate the American Rescue Plan and push for the upcoming American Jobs Plan to become law. Democrats are primed to deliver once again for Hoosiers. \- Indiana Republicans Taking Credit for American Rescue Plan Funds - We know that Indiana and Hoosier families have a bright future ahead thanks to President Joe Biden and Democrats passing the American Rescue Plan -- a plan that not one Republican supported. Not a single one. The American Rescue Plan is why Indiana is putting COVID-19 in the rearview mirror. Even though not a single Republican supported the American Rescue Plan, they are now trying to take credit for the impact it's bringing to our state. In the same breath, Republicans are still attacking Democrats for the cost of the Rescue Plan (and upcoming American Jobs Plan). Remember: under their watch, the national debt went up by $7.8 trillion -- in just four years! Indiana Republicans cannot have it both ways. Republicans did not support this responsible, common-sense agenda. Instead, Republicans are abiding by a form of extreme partisanship not seen in recent history. Indiana Republicans are taking credit for the , , and broadband expansion and economic development projects -- but they refuse to admit the American Rescue Plan made all of this possible. As Indiana Democrats deliver for Hoosier families, we must also hold Republicans accountable for choosing their partisanship over the Rescue Plan. \- Indiana Democrats Kick Off the American Jobs Plan Tour - ** This past week, Indiana Democrats went back on the road again to let Hoosiers know why Indiana needs the American Jobs Plan. The pitch was simple: the Jobs Plan will create a better future for Hoosier families. The Jobs Plan is going to set Indiana up for long-term success by creating good-paying jobs that will rebuild Indiana's infrastructure and strengthen Indiana's workforce. It will revitalize VA hospitals and eliminate the childcare deserts across Indiana. The Jobs Plan will also pick up where the Rescue Plan left off by further expanding broadband internet access across the state. Indiana Democrats are ready to meet Hoosiers where they are to engage with the community. It's why Indiana Democrats are crisscrossing the state to let Hoosiers know why Indiana needs the American Jobs Plan - no matter the zip code. We're ready to build a better future and create better opportunities for our families, and we ask you to join us. Contact your county party to find an event near you and to learn more about why Indiana needs the Jobs Plan by . \- Opportunities - \- Fall Internship 2021 - The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates. Benefits Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials Enhanced communication and organizational skills Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school. Intern Duties Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include: campaign research voter outreach data entry assistance with local campaign events special projects Qualifications Applications must be: passionate about Democratic politics trustworthy and responsible able to communicate effectively with others flexible and willing to help when needed able to work on multiple tasks at once Start/End Dates and Schedule Applications for the Fall of 2021 are now being accepted until August 13, 2021 We are not currently accepting applications for the Spring of 2022. Fall interns must commit to working a minimum of 20 - 30 hours per week. The Party will be flexible on days and times, as well as start and end dates, to help accommodate class and work schedules of interns. This position has a monthly stipend but does not include travel reimbursement. Hybrid virtual/in-person opportunities are possible. How to Apply Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at lauren@indems.org. Email Lauren or call 317-231-7122 for more information. -Save the date- Cass County Democratic Party: , July 17, 9:00 - 10:00 AM, Black Dog Coffee, 116 S 6th St, Logansport, IN 46947 Bartholomew County Democratic Party: \[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%7D\]%7D&FFF.07.16.21=FFF.07.16.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWJjM2NmYS01OGU2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gax6AywfXYHleKngVYeY3N2NHubfROqSZOhMpQWNV0=&emci=6a19cf78-50e6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=41bc3cfa-58e6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535, July 17, 9:00 - ---
| | Hi friend,

As campaign manager, I wanted to reach out and talk with you about the stakes of this race. As polling proves, Tom Nelson is the candidate with the message that can defeat Ron Johnson.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32503152/295976616/217346270?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210716_1_3&refcode2=03a97a0e-5ae6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2E5N2EwZS01YWU2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uwAJ-9QH2J9strfxhBa1KgppwkGjGFlrmxLiOT5-3_Q=)
However, our progressive message is at risk of being drowned out by our opponents. Why? Some of our opponents are millionaire self-funders who have spent decades outside Wisconsin and don’t have to worry about fundraising. As the son of a Lutheran pastor deeply committed to fighting systemic racism and big money in politics, Tom doesn’t have too many Wall Street friends. But we have YOU.

That’s why we’re reaching out asking you for a donation in the middle of July with over a year until election day. _We’re in an unfair fight where money plays too big a role in our campaigns, but with your support, we can help level the playing field._

[So, I’m just going to lay my cards on the table. We still need to raise over $3,128 by tonight at midnight to keep up with our self-funding opponents, especially Ron Johnson. Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. clean_body: | | Hi friend, As campaign manager, I wanted to reach out and talk with you about the stakes of this race. As polling proves, Tom Nelson is the candidate with the message that can defeat Ron Johnson. = However, our progressive message is at risk of being drowned out by our opponents. Why? Some of our opponents are millionaire self-funders who have spent decades outside Wisconsin and don’t have to worry about fundraising. As the son of a Lutheran pastor deeply committed to fighting systemic racism and big money in politics, Tom doesn’t have too many Wall Street friends. But we have YOU. That’s why we’re reaching out asking you for a donation in the middle of July with over a year until election day. We’re in an unfair fight where money plays too big a role in our campaigns, but with your support, we can help level the playing field. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Tom is the only elected progressive candidate in this race who comes from a Trump county, which makes him best suited to defeat Ron Johnson. We can’t win this race by nominating a candidate who isn’t willing to stand up to big money and fight for policies that will help working families. Thank you for your continued support of this campaign, Irene Lin | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. name: Larry Elder
subject: What happened to the California dream, Peter?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57952875:Jquu8MlWN:m:1:3253819041:E70BA260ECCDC5716A17BF04AC21CB1F:r)

---
Peter,

My name is Larry Elder and I'm a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I'm a proud Californian.

But I can't stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - **which is why I 'm announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election!**

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57952875:Jquu8MlWN:m:1:3253819041:E70BA260ECCDC5716A17BF04AC21CB1F:r)
My high school-dropout father worked TWO full time jobs as a janitor in Los Angeles. But he was a hard worker, he saved his nickels and dimes until he could buy us a house in South Central Los Angeles.

At that time, **this was the American dream and California was where people came to achieve it.** Now, our over-reaching, leftist dominated government has made this dream nearly **impossible to achieve.**

Today's California is a sad state of affairs. **Our taxes are rising almost as fast as our crime rates, and our homeless population accounts for 25% of the whole country 's and only is growing under a Democrat dominated government.** [**We must end the Democrats ' full control of our state before it's too late, Peter. Can I count in you to help me do that?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57952875:Jquu8MlWN:m:1:3253819041:E70BA260ECCDC5716A17BF04AC21CB1F:r)

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57952875:Jquu8MlWN:m:1:3253819041:E70BA260ECCDC5716A17BF04AC21CB1F:r)
Enough is enough, and I refuse to watch while Gavin Newsom ruins our state with abusive executive order after executive order. His draconian control has gone too far!

During the pandemic, he dined for $35,000 at the French Laundry without a mask with the same health officials and lobbyists that imposed the shutdown! **Meanwhile businesses he didn 't frequent weren't allowed to stay open. He shut down in-school learning while his own children enjoyed the luxury of private in-school instruction.**

I'm absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom's failed Democrat-led dictatorship. **Our businesses should be open, our schools should be open. Opportunity doesn 't come from prolonged covid stimulus that should have ended months ago. It is forged in a thriving and free economy and top-notch schools - neither of which exists in California under Newsom.**

Peter, I know that I have what it takes to restore California to its former state of bountiful opportunity, but I'm going to need you on my team every step of the way. With only a short amount of time remaining until the election, [**will you join my team?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57952875:Jquu8MlWN:m:1:3253819041:E70BA260ECCDC5716A17BF04AC21CB1F:r)

[**California is in desperate need of strong, common-sense conservative leadership right now and I 'm willing to step up to the plate to help stop Gavin Newsom from further destroying California. Are you with me?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57952875:Jquu8MlWN:m:1:3253819041:E70BA260ECCDC5716A17BF04AC21CB1F:r)

Thank you,

Larry Elder

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57952875:Jquu8MlWN:m:1:3253819041:E70BA260ECCDC5716A17BF04AC21CB1F:r)

| | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
---

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32503697/295978491/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzQzMzhhYS01YmU2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5M0rWecLZ-FGkCjcpodpuO4OmhX6sSVzoqJ9cdwCKFM=) Quick update, friend.

Right now, Democrats in Texas are doing everything possible to prevent Greg Abbott from ramming through one of the worst voter suppression bills in our state's history.

Texas Democrats broke quorum and effectively blocked the GOP majority from passing Senate Bill 7 -- the GOP’s voter suppression bill. Among its many restrictive provisions, SB7 would have cut the number of polling locations and voting machines in high-propensity Democratic areas. This alone would have crushed our chances at making any electoral progress in Texas. **Democrats stopped it.**

The point is this: we are holding the line and it’s working, but we need to keep applying pressure:

**In Austin where I'm running for Congress, voter turnout in places like Travis County still lags behind the national average. That’s inexcusable. So we're organizing earlier than ever because stronger turnout here means a greater chance of flipping Texas and ending Abbott's antics once and for all.**

We can do this, but it depends on your support:

clean_body: | = Quick update, friend. Right now, Democrats in Texas are doing everything possible to prevent Greg Abbott from ramming through one of the worst voter suppression bills in our state's history. Texas Democrats broke quorum and effectively blocked the GOP majority from passing Senate Bill 7 -- the GOP’s voter suppression bill. Among its many restrictive provisions, SB7 would have cut the number of polling locations and voting machines in high-propensity Democratic areas. This alone would have crushed our chances at making any electoral progress in Texas. Democrats stopped it. The point is this: we are holding the line and it’s working, but we need to keep applying pressure: In Austin where I'm running for Congress, voter turnout in places like Travis County still lags behind the national average. That’s inexcusable. So we're organizing earlier than ever because stronger turnout here means a greater chance of flipping Texas and ending Abbott's antics once and for all. We can do this, but it depends on your support: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Here's something we cannot overlook: An increase in Democratic turnout in Austin could go a long way in helping flip key statewide seats like the Governor's and our indicted Attorney General Ken Paxton's. While state-level Democrats fight the good fight, we must support races like ours that can drive turnout in the coming election. We've proven we know how to get Democrats to the polls -- this is our chance to finish the job in 2022. = Thank you, Donna = | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer running to flip Texas from red to blue. Last year, she took on the 9-term Trump-backed Republican incumbent and came closer than anyone ever imagined. If you'd like to learn more, you can visit Donna's website here: Consider supporting Donna's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717 make check payable to Donna Imam for Congress. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Donna Imam For Congress PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717 United States

name: Steve Daines
subject: END Big Tech Bias!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
For years, the Big Tech overlords have been suppressing and silencing conservative voices. | [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=874dcb29aec24503aa63e2d689714f16&_e=wX16CZwrMxMn7KhYaMy88CMeniOl9sUFsfomULLgAKweVPNgkKTTgLOLf9Tx9QdLMALHLPFZXAQbqMAvDNw0sQpkAYXFplWw38Fr2ET4nFk4-aSkjS0mrjRgS89rwWYBh3liA9NY6UezjwOTECJSYtKHE8i5p2zHkiJJrctX5YEPOT0BM-0-kCQXQ9MvGJdzTll-ws9FEkkg51RWSeVu9BV3N1boO8-4XshmzA2WvYdasf7gHcPMc6_eGBS-gAT-Ev4oYTwx__KKweqvfQJsxMSS4y9c9uy5K_M4NXOL58Xrb5XZXXoAeFAZCbAPSh0Xg3JuWiMRc5aIQL7UAGzO3CpNE3zzgeBqYLoSQCtBHXTGEZPz5F8h5F2N56U0lcGo5eumho33xyU-Z4qes1zgPuaoHBoeNV6HBQlIBuDkEjodoz-pGIeHoQfn6-xRVtaiqE8tZRKlcJ776KgXhwxQ04wlS7Ca_n97SlZYKce4nIw8z2u60zCcIVKPirmeRf8pcmF7eXbEH2CqSXmTIzHEYA%3D%3D)
