Fellow Conservative,

I just introduced a new bill in the U.S. Senate to address one of the most pressing and dangerous situations we face in America today - **the highly partisan actions of “Big Tech” to censor conservatives on social media platforms.**

With President Donald Trump’s recently filed lawsuit against the Big Tech giants Facebook, Google, and Twitter for outright banning him from social media alongside the millions of Americans who are “shadow banned,” this disturbing discrimination and rampant censorship is once again in the news, _but it’s certainly nothing new._

We know the truth. For years, the Big Tech overlords have been suppressing and silencing conservative voices in a thinly veiled effort to help their left-wing globalist allies in the Democrat Party, and this grave injustice needs to end and **it needs to end NOW!**

That’s why I’m introducing the **“Preserving Political Speech Online Act”** in the U.S. Senate to finally crack down and end the Big Tech oligarchs ability to discriminate based on a user’s political beliefs and speech.

**[Fellow Conservative, will you join me and show how much grassroots support there is behind this fair and commonsense legislation to end Big Tech censorship and discrimination by adding your name to my “First Amendment Fairness!” Petition today?](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=874dcb29aec24503aa63e2d689714f16&_e=wX16CZwrMxMn7KhYaMy88CMeniOl9sUFsfomULLgAKweVPNgkKTTgLOLf9Tx9QdLMALHLPFZXAQbqMAvDNw0sQpkAYXFplWw38Fr2ET4nFk4-aSkjS0mrjRgS89rwWYBh3liA9NY6UezjwOTECJSYtKHE8i5p2zHkiJJrctX5YEPOT0BM-0-kCQXQ9MvGJdzTll-ws9FEkkg51RWSeVu9BV3N1boO8-4XshmzA2WvYdasf7gHcPMc6_eGBS-gAT-Ev4oYTwx__KKweqvfQJsxMSS4y9c9uy5K_M4NXOL58Xrb5XZXXoAeFAZCbAPSh0XkqPXMy-ILyqmddz69mJCUvFNzLGZ6BmswbV0UNYsXlgJQVo_fsGBByUks8bZv-4fXzbV_f51CFT7lD7VJE4s962nU35wKrGrr2mNoP3tti26ONJgFgae3LR57WY7de1ab7htKxfwC_Y4etLp6zvuhudZ7PCdEIBXGZJcqjuScZxb4Mcq-vT5VfshOsNLAfON8aT2PGq6oa3yb3r_hTyRkQ%3D%3D)**

**[It’s time to demand the end of Big Tech’s arrogant self-appointed determination of who gets to use social media and who does not, Fellow Conservative, so please sign my Petition now and help me hold them accountable!](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=874dcb29aec24503aa63e2d689714f16&_e=wX16CZwrMxMn7KhYaMy88CMeniOl9sUFsfomULLgAKweVPNgkKTTgLOLf9Tx9QdLMALHLPFZXAQbqMAvDNw0sQpkAYXFplWw38Fr2ET4nFk4-aSkjS0mrjRgS89rwWYBh3liA9NY6UezjwOTECJSYtKHE8i5p2zHkiJJrctX5YEPOT0BM-0-kCQXQ9MvGJdzTll-ws9FEkkg51RWSeVu9BV3N1boO8-4XshmzA2WvYdasf7gHcPMc6_eGBS-gAT-Ev4oYTwx__KKweqvfQJsxMSS4y9c9uy5K_M4NXOL58Xrb5XZXXoAeFAZCbAPSh0XlGwfzUgfAMHelUfD0UB4AslFV0iz9pr51jZQXJAWCDdo3fpus7xTx1cGGZxqonU5dHyRbmdMdxGTMAY4bwl4oLTOuhAxvnnoWd2-8PekJU74A2wr7dPgaolQy_heSgXkeH2wAORMM8yM6qRjRvvTQkJDkgTdY9Qqqd0dckBfBl444Ql6rBOugmdl5HPaTJfYVOIpQi5TUf-aLC8S5H10qA%3D%3D)**

**[Thank you, Fellow Conservative- we must all stand together to ensure the leftist bias of Big Tech is brought to an end - please sign the Petition immediately!](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=874dcb29aec24503aa63e2d689714f16&_e=wX16CZwrMxMn7KhYaMy88CMeniOl9sUFsfomULLgAKweVPNgkKTTgLOLf9Tx9QdLMALHLPFZXAQbqMAvDNw0sQpkAYXFplWw38Fr2ET4nFk4-aSkjS0mrjRgS89rwWYBh3liA9NY6UezjwOTECJSYtKHE8i5p2zHkiJJrctX5YEPOT0BM-0-kCQXQ9MvGJdzTll-ws9FEkkg51RWSeVu9BV3N1boO8-4XshmzA2WvYdasf7gHcPMc6_eGBS-gAT-Ev4oYTwx__KKweqvfQJsxMSS4y9c9uy5K_M4NXOL58Xrb5XZXXoAeFAZCbAPSh0XAZWgLh5xv3pyaYhKyhJLGPv1o6s6oHamV7aPtMy6rZvISOYegWlFn5g_xAC9ttWv49XdfxtSa50_98CJKoVrg-1AZwhjpO6NzconrOvOAVWDkOaZGusgFm1mEhCBCrYGe-gvTu_HFuwZWZPIl-_QkwJkT4pNunCZLpsx_FhwkAOA4ygLn7OhGyrl1E_GEU6Q-iN397nXFRMEx0q1Kltejw%3D%3D)**

Thank you,

Senator Steve Daines

|
_Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track.[Chip in $10 or more to help Steve today!](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=874dcb29aec24503aa63e2d689714f16&_e=wX16CZwrMxMn7KhYaMy88CMeniOl9sUFsfomULLgAKweVPNgkKTTgLOLf9Tx9QdLMALHLPFZXAQbqMAvDNw0sQpkAYXFplWw38Fr2ET4nFk4-aSkjS0mrjRgS89rwWYBh3liA9NY6UezjwOTECJSYtKHE8i5p2zHkiJJrctX5YEPOT0BM-0-kCQXQ9MvGJdzTll-ws9FEkkg51RWSeVu9BV3N1boO8-4XshmzA2WvYdasf7gHcPMc6_eGBS-gAT-Ev4oYTwx__KKweqvfQJsxMSS4y9c9uy5K_M4NXOL58Xrb5XZXXoAeFAZCbAPSh0X06BudnswK5m5bLd4QXdFwd21XfoTbtKxyScFBUCY7skhhgr1nrqQMEqDTmY7yylH5vJSzeSuBzhoOuT4frtOx3V3SaYCiSu7jDGSUNM5uC4PQJM_yUEX6rZMjxPoYZa7PbCfrbcILBjkr7jHF1ZwWROo-5BR8wymZch_Pwh74ft7cpTzD6L1dFzuc8mKB3Gom0uGh6PLoot-Rcc_ky1J4Q%3D%3D)

name: Karen Bass
subject: Me again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Team,

We are so close to hitting our $5,000 mid-month goal. But close won't cut it when falling short means less resources to protect the Democratic House majority.

What we raise has a direct impact on the strength of this campaign and the progressive candidates we support heading into the midterms. So I'm reaching out one last time before tonight's deadline to see if I can count on you to donate what you can toward our important goal.

I had my finance team pull you a personal link. Will you chip in directly toward our mid-month goal to help us cross the finish line? >> **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bass-july21?refcode1=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/-_yOwAaS8GgPpp_VLu99iw17z4y6BlZ_UxP3Mxusf84=/-Pg73XLUpw0SjYmgAglE7B-oRZV4dQSTNycUBLOgppM=?gpsid=39_132_19699&refcode=em21_210716_mm3_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210716_mm3_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

July is one of the slowest fundraising months out of the year. People are checked out, but I need this team to stay engaged so we don't fall behind on the important work in front of us.

When we flipped the House in 2018, it wasn't because of donations that came at the last minute. It was because of early, strategic investments that helped secure one of the most progressive, diverse Congresses in American history.

That Congress is leading the fight for social and economic justice. I know we can make history again in 2022, beat the odds stacked against us, and defend the House. But we need that fire -- that early investment -- to carry us forward.

Friend, I'm counting on you: chip in $5, $8, or whatever you can afford, to help our grassroots campaign hit our mid-month goal >> **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bass-july21?refcode1=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/-_yOwAaS8GgPpp_VLu99iw17z4y6BlZ_UxP3Mxusf84=/-Pg73XLUpw0SjYmgAglE7B-oRZV4dQSTNycUBLOgppM=?gpsid=39_132_19699&refcode=em21_210716_mm3_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210716_mm3_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

-- KB

_Sent from my iPhone_

Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
---

Bass for Congress
918 Pennsylvania Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003 United States

We rely on this email to communicate with this grassroots team, but if you no longer want to receive our emails, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-_yOwAaS8GgPpp_VLu99iw17z4y6BlZ_UxP3Mxusf84=/D-_SMJ7ETTuBdDVZC5J3Uo8ezAKVGQnIl7nI6xPekGE=).

name: Jon Mark Hogg
subject: He visited us not just once, but over and over again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89772/images/Logo%20%282%29.png]
Hello folks —

Running for Congress in 2020 confirmed what I have long known. Most statewide Democratic candidates find little value in rural Texas in general, and West Texas in particular. It is a place to raise money, but not one in which to spend time, get to know the people or learn or care about their worries and problems. But not for Mike Collier.

Starting in his 2018 race, Mike has paid a lot of attention to the deep red areas of Texas. He visited us not just once, but over and over again. After his narrow loss in 2018, he never let up. He has continued to spend lots of time here, more than any other Democratic candidate has done. Perhaps that's why he outperformed every other Democrat in 2⁄3 of Texas’ counties in 2018.

Some candidates attempt to emulate him, but they seldom surpass him in personal attention to the forgotten heartland, and hinterland, of Texas. Quantity time is quality time, I always say. You can never know people unless you are with them a lot. Mike is here a lot. He shows up, he spends time with us, listens to us and speaks our language.

If more Democratic candidates followed his example, Texas might not be in the horrible predicament it is today. If we are a non-voting state, maybe the reason is because Democrats never offer the vast majority of Texans something they want to vote for. Mike Collier has figured that out.

In my view, if Texas Democrats win a state-wide election in 2022, it will be Lt. Governor and it will be because of the votes in rural Texas, Democratic, Republican and Independent, for Mike Collier.

Thanks for hearing me out,

Jon Mark Hogg

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc-email-july2021?refcode=mc-em210716-op-ed]

Jon Mark Hogg is a lawyer in San Angelo, Texas and Founder of The 134 PAC, which is dedicated to growing the Democratic vote in the 134 counties West of I-35.
The Collier Committee
P.O. Box 14648
Humble, TX 77347
United States

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
We need to show the far-left that we want CRT far away from our children. | | | |

| | | Patriot,

Rep. Jake LaTurner is fighting hard for us in Washington, _**and he wants to hear from you.**_

In recent months, we've seen a new term come into the American mainstream: **Critical Race Theory**.

We want to know what you think. Answer this [quick CRT survey](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=935bacf44c&e=1050d051da).

name: Team Franchot
subject: The Climate Stakes of 2022
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter,
Climate change is one of the greatest existential threats to our way of life. From flooding of coastal cities, to increased frequency of extreme weather events, to greater health threats caused by waterborne diseases and poorer air quality, the effects of climate change could prove catastrophic if we don’t take urgent action to curb carbon emissions and preserve our natural environment.
Peter Franchot knows the stakes, which is why he is going to take urgent action on Day One to put Maryland on track to become the first net zero state in the nation.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatestakes2022?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatestakes2022?amount=20.22]As part of his plan, Peter Franchot will sign an executive order mandating that state government entities fully convert to renewable energy by the end of his first term. He’ll also convert the entire fleet of state vehicles to electric power, and he’ll commit to investing in carbon-capture technology to reduce our historic emissions, and make Maryland a hub in this critical and high potential area of climate technology.
But in order to make Peter Franchot’s bold vision for a greener Maryland future a reality, we’re first going to need your help to win this election. Our people-powered campaign relies on grassroots supporters like you to keep us going, and we have less than 12 months to secure the nomination for the bold leader who will take on our climate emergency.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatestakes2022?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatestakes2022?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatestakes2022?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatestakes2022?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatestakes2022]Anything you can give is greatly appreciated. Your grassroots contribution will be a force-multiplier in our efforts to get our message out to Maryland voters. With your help, we can print more field literature, plant more yard signs, run more digital ads, hire more organizers, and invest in other critical tools that will help us reach more people.
The climate stakes of this election are high. The next Governor of Maryland will have the opportunity to take urgent action to make the difference in the fight against climate change. If you want to see Maryland become the first net zero state in the nation and a leader in renewable energy, we need your support today.
Click here to chip in whatever you can to support our people-powered movement. Together, we can secure a greener future for Maryland’s communities. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatestakes2022?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatestakes2022?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

Fellow Conservative, this is alarming.

Democrats are pushing to have critical race theory taught in public schools across the entire nation - **in ALL 50 states, including New Mexico!**

The Left is attempting to rewrite American history to promote the lie that our country was founded on racism and continues to be irredeemably racist. What’s worse, their target audience for this anti-American, dangerous ideology is your children and grandchildren - the future of our country!

[**I need to hear from you immediately, Fellow Conservative - Do you support teaching our children critical race theory in public schools?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b913d86a4aa942239700484e565bed74&_e=o9cfoMwx75eqWubXAIkPS4pVTNupo6Zdev8e2HD4-v6vqlvj8UmsnuWyVlCAkUvgFi4ocs5IyQ2ZVplkn0giAVMdhh788oKaLKWXckSbgYig4axmFKc2es0gcSrqx74mP99NnXJOSuTQlOP8sECGSo5SQA3KxRtfCw4Y8Tp_fC4bLc6Rhy5cNB9uz9SRp9EJSFmUmQ1BD15DsS_n42OCaRXHjNQVMs2a7ZBRWf4_nFK73YpmCLWKtwCws_p8V753X5WJWf6Gb9IPOP5ui_eZ0eP0RCziqxJ9F88Fs58s2BgqCrQ4toA2efiQw7Dzd-MeCwUiL1RWwtA1fc_6pzdaEDXEyU6bZ1C1LmoB_8ojVDcF4N9p3gxdn5KdCWFg4KXqS8DCIqJJuaJ9MLXLTjErl4okkvT95q2z3dlbV09wMqfoiDO3kBLD-ie98utfbXSmQqqmdZwNvvcAayYVb30-w_tob7wfDyui_zbeQhP8UUYTzlUTDuDXXKlvTdq4L3iR3n0hSZoFK0YEz36Q3CQYxkdtVPDVx9NmCXTCwqW8XKzOqB96OnpiLvU2vhgKYWLr)

We continue to work to improve our imperfect union, but Democrats pushing the ideology that America, and the Constitution, is inherently racist is simply false and they are doing this with malice to cultivate our children for their future Democrat vote.

We should not be teaching Americans to hate themselves for past generations’ mistakes, nor should we be teaching them to hate America - _the beacon of freedom and Democracy to the entire world._

name: Erica Smith
subject: Dirt road Democrat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I’m the only candidate in this primary with a Green New Deal, reparations, and Medicare for All front and center in my platform.
#
Hi, it’s Erica.
**I’m a dirt road Democrat running to become North Carolina’s next U.S. Senator.** If you didn’t know that already, now you do.
Unlike other candidates in this primary who have jobs that allow them to call wealthy donors all day, I have to spend my time doing what I’ve been doing since I was 9 years old.
That’s harvesting corn and picking cucumbers on the family farm! The same family farm where I was raised, and my mother before me.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5425?refcode=em20210716-258&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=258%2E3698%2EAJDiUV)
I understand the dignity of work. I know what it means to struggle, to work all day to put food on the table for your family. These are the values and experiences behind our campaign for U.S. Senate in North Carolina.
Look, I’m proud to be the only candidate in this primary with a Green New Deal, reparations, and Medicare for All front and center in my platform.
**My opponents, on the other hand, are afraid of being bold.** They’re beholden to the Democratic establishment’s moderate playbook, and unfortunately they outraised us by a lot last quarter.
But let’s just be honest with ourselves: We live in a world where our oceans are literally burning, where Black men are imprisoned at six times the rate of white men, and where working families go bankrupt because of health care costs. **Urgent, progressive change — the kind of change I am uniquely fighting for in this primary for U.S. Senate — cannot wait.**
It looks like you haven’t donated to our campaign yet, which is why I am reaching out to you today:
[**_Will you make a donation of $5 or more to our unapologetic, scrappy campaign today, please? We can’t afford to be outraised by our moderate establishment opponents this quarter, which is why small-dollar, online donations, like yours, are so important._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5425?refcode=em20210716-258&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=258%2E3698%2EAJDiUV)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5425?refcode=em20210716-258&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=258%2E3698%2EAJDiUV)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate
P.S. Our campaign doesn’t take a dime of corporate or fossil fuel money trying to buy D.C. influence. [**_We rely on grassroots donors like you, chipping in $1, $3, $5 at a time to support our people-powered movement through emails like this one. Will you please make a donation of $5 or more today?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5425?refcode=em20210716-258&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=258%2E3698%2EAJDiUV)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210716-258-footer&t=23&refcode2=258_3698_AJDiUV&akid=258%2E3698%2EAJDiUV)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=258%2E3698%2EAJDiUV)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=258%2E3698%2EAJDiUV)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

subject: TOSS-UP

body:
Breaking news, Peter --

**_The Cook Political Report_ just moved Wisconsin’s Senate race from Lean Republican to Toss-Up!** That’s on top of major news outlets like _CNN_ calling Ron Johnson the most vulnerable incumbent GOP senator up in 2022.

Our race is one of the Democrats’ best chances to flip a Senate seat and expand our 50-50 majority. But if we don’t have the resources to defeat Ron Johnson, there’s a high chance we could see Mitch McConnell back in the driver’s seat.

Republicans only need to flip one seat to take back the Senate -- that makes Wisconsin all the more critical in this election. And we've been saying it since launching our campaign: Sarah Godlewski is the candidate to defeat Ron Johnson.

But this new race ranking doesn't mean our race is going to get any easier -- in fact, national Republicans have lobbed several nasty attacks against Sarah, distorting her record, and lying to voters. This Toss-Up ranking will only further their involvement in Wisconsin.

Sarah isn't afraid of a tough fight -- she has experience winning them. She has won two statewide elections (even beating her 2018 GOP opponent by more than 100,000 votes!). If she’s going to beat Ron Johnson, we need this grassroots team to step up like never before and help collect the resources we’ll need to fight back.

[**Our fragile 50-50 Senate majority is on the line, which means we cannot risk losing this race. That’s on top of major news outlets like CNN calling Ron Johnson the most vulnerable incumbent GOP senator up in 2022. It is going to be a hotly contested election. We can't wait until next year, the time to act is NOW. [**Now would be a great time to chip in so that a single mother could use campaign funds for childcare and would not have to bring her children to a campaign event where they might be in harm's way.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32505978/295986016/1834377524?refcode=0716&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcyZjM4YjM2LTYxZTYtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=86EMmLCJCmAemEFCtPsIov0_OgpzlBAWDeVmE8ZCyrM=) Every donation helps Katie spend less time on fundraising and more time on fighting for our Democracy. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Tax the rich? That’s “socialism”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|

| | Hi Peter, It isn't news that the wealthiest Americans simply do not pay their fair share. But do you know why, Peter? **The Senate GOP simply can't admit their favorite president was wrong.** Joe Biden's bold new budget is simply common sense if we hope to claw our way out of Donald Trump's disastrous pandemic economy. Democrats argue that real change requires big new taxes on corporations, billionaires, and capital gains earned from stock market investments. To most people, these taxes sound long overdue. | **[TAX THE RICH](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32506708/295988470/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210716_GEN_FDR_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyOWZmNGQ5LTYzZTYtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=x6zVJpVyJUqxc7xbYvsuww4-TII8tp1fwtqehUUG3B4=)**
---

Maybe you guessed it: Mitch McConnell thinks making the wealthy pay their fair share would turn America into Bernie Sanders' idea of “a socialist country.”

Every single Republican is taking McConnell's lead on this, despite Democrats' earnest attempts to reach across the aisle through the reconciliation process. Our slim majority is going to need to dramatically ramp up its approach if we want to secure this life-changing progressive tax code.

And we need your help to do it. When Democrats Turn Out has hit the ground running, getting crucial resources directly in the hands of our progressive leaders in the Senate. **But if we can't meet our $2,000 fundraising deadline by midnight tonight, we'll be forced to show up to the fight empty-handed.**

**[We're asking you directly: Please donate what you can \-- $5, $10, $25, or even more – to When Democrats Turn Out right now and play a critical role in making sure that the wealthiest Americans and greedy corporations pay their fair share for once.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32506709/295988471/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210716_GEN_FDR_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyOWZmNGQ5LTYzZTYtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=x6zVJpVyJUqxc7xbYvsuww4-TII8tp1fwtqehUUG3B4=)**

But Mondaire had the perfect response:

**That’s why we’re setting a goal of 500 individual contributions before Trump’s visit to the district on August 5th. So we’re asking:**
**[If you’re able, please make a contribution to help us meet our 500 contribution goal. We want Donald Trump and his band of right-wing conspiracy theorists to know his rhetoric is not welcome in New York’s 17th Congressional District.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32507498/295990636/-748347061?refcode2=7313e2cd-66e6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210716-1-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzEzZTJjZC02NmU2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BJFIj8KL_0yAdnbj6k7-18Lo56eZguNC2xUIprKKU2A=)**

But Mondaire had the perfect response: = Mondaire’s right — and we want Donald Trump and his pro-insurrection donors to know that they have no place in our district. That’s why we’re setting a goal of 500 individual contributions before Trump’s visit to the district on August 5th. So we’re asking: = Thank you for reading. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: We fell just short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
So, it turns out we fell just shy of hitting that big goal.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210716-2013-header&t=1&akid=2013%2E434096%2EW9a4Pw)
Peter, welp!
Sometimes you set an ambitious goal and it just doesn’t work out.
We were trying to cross the 250k contributions milestone by midnight on the 15th — our mid-month fundraising deadline. **Honestly, we fell just a little short.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22289?refcode=em20210716-2013&t=2&akid=2013%2E434096%2EW9a4Pw)
But that’s totally OK! We still have the best grassroots team in the country. _By far!_ And, honestly, I think we can even hit 250k today if we make a big push. [** _We’re so close. Can you just add your first donation of $5 to get us over the line?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22289?refcode=em20210716-2013&t=3&akid=2013%2E434096%2EW9a4Pw)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22289?refcode=em20210716-2013&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2013%2E434096%2EW9a4Pw)**
Thanks so much for your continued faith in John and this movement. 💙
Together, I know we’re going to flip this seat and give President Biden that 51st vote he needs in the U.S. Senate.
Eric
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210716-2013-footer&t=23&refcode2=2013_434096_W9a4Pw&akid=2013%2E434096%2EW9a4Pw)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=2013%2E434096%2EW9a4Pw)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2013%2E434096%2EW9a4Pw)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Darin
subject: fwd: we can’t cede any more ground
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
These CEOs of Censorship are colluding with the Democrat party... _Friend_ _ー it’s Darin. _ _I’m reaching out about President Trump’s lawsuit against Big Tech._ _These CEOs of Censorship are colluding with the Democratic party to_ _censor Republicans_ _,__deplatform conservatives_ _, and_ _silence dissenting voices_ _. _ **_We can’t afford to cede any more ground to these tech totalitarians. _** Peter,

Did you see ProPublica's report about billionaires avoiding federal income taxes?

ProPublica, a non-profit news agency, obtained IRS data that showed how some of the wealthiest individuals in America have avoided paying federal income tax. **_Unlike_ most hard-working Americans, those at the top have not paid their fair share -- and they've been doing it for years.**

Here's an example: the median American household earns around $70,000 and pays 14% in federal income tax. On the other hand, Jeff Bezos aka, the richest man in the world, paid $0 in federal income tax in multiple tax filings. But it wasn't just Jeff Bezos. He joins a long list of millionaires and billionaires who manipulate our tax system.

The American tax system is broken because for years politicians like Mike Garcia have prioritized passing policies that would help their wealthy donors instead of policies that would empower their constituents.

**We need a leader like Christy Smith to be a voice for everyone in CA-25, not just those with deep pockets.[Peter, will you chip in to help Christy Smith's campaign today -- we need a LEADER that will stand up to the wealthy 1% and demand systemic reforms that will benefit the people right here in this district.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32510894/296005122/1485983175?refcode=em21_210716_midmonth1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTYyNDgxYS03MWU2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0TJ64K6089WDaFeEPjKhlZkZH0BdeIxRHnWhL3-jjK8=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32510899/296005125/1485983175?refcode=em21_210716_midmonth1&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTYyNDgxYS03MWU2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0TJ64K6089WDaFeEPjKhlZkZH0BdeIxRHnWhL3-jjK8=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32510906/296005132/1485983175?refcode=em21_210716_midmonth1&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTYyNDgxYS03MWU2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0TJ64K6089WDaFeEPjKhlZkZH0BdeIxRHnWhL3-jjK8=)

clean_body: | Peter, Did you see ProPublica's report about billionaires avoiding federal income taxes? ProPublica, a non-profit news agency, obtained IRS data that showed how some of the wealthiest individuals in America have avoided paying federal income tax. Unlike most hard-working Americans, those at the top have not paid their fair share -- and they've been doing it for years. Here's an example: the median American household earns around $70,000 and pays 14% in federal income tax. On the other hand, Jeff Bezos aka, the richest man in the world, paid $0 in federal income tax in multiple tax filings. But it wasn't just Jeff Bezos. He joins a long list of millionaires and billionaires who manipulate our tax system. The American tax system is broken because for years politicians like Mike Garcia have prioritized passing policies that would help their wealthy donors instead of policies that would empower their constituents. We need a leader like Christy Smith to be a voice for everyone in CA-25, not just those with deep pockets.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Despite the Republican propaganda that advocates for tax cuts for the wealthiest of Americans, this report highlights how broken our current tax system really is. Mike Garcia and his friends in Congress have no plans to change the status quo. Their tax policies of a trickle-down economy, where the wealthiest pay no taxes has never worked. But with super slim majorities in Congress, it's hard to pass legislation that can actually fix our current tax structure. That's why we have to fight to flip every Republican seat in 2022. And the change starts right here in CA-25 with grassroots donors like you, Peter. = Thank you for standing up to the powerful and wealthy! Flip CA-25 = Christy Smith is only soliciting funds that comply with federal campaign finance laws. *

subject: Does Critical Race Theory belong in our schools?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
We need to show the far-left that we want CRT far away from our children. | | | |
---
| | | Patriot,

Rep. Jake LaTurner is fighting hard for us in Washington, _**and he wants to hear from you.**_

In recent months, we've seen a new term come into the American mainstream: **Critical Race Theory**.

We want to know what you think. Answer this [quick CRT survey](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=5c0e568215&e=1050d051da).

**Should our children be learning this divisive ideology?**

name: Ric Grenell, me (2)
subject: RE: The next time I talk to Pres. Trump
body:
My most recent action to secure our elections.
| Peter,
---
I was truly humbled to see all the patriots who became Founding Members of my new initiative to carry out President Trump's mission to secure elections in California.
---

body:
#

[**Friends — we’re respectfully asking you to make a $5 donation to our people-powered campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21&refcode=em210716-1-15?t=1&refcode2=957_6688874_PZRvy2&akid=957%2E6688874%2EPZRvy2)
Sorry to be so blunt, but we need to add 1,000 contributions today to help us stay on track to reach our goal of 40,000 contributions by the end of this month.
Hitting this goal is so important because a new Republican opponent just entered our race and they have a $10 million PAC backing them up. Not to mention, One Nation, a Mitch McConnell-aligned Super PAC, is still running $1 MILLION on ads in Arizona attacking Mark as we speak.
These are the latest signs that National Republicans aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022.
So in order to counter this avalanche of outside spending, we are going to fight back one $5 donation at a time. Because that’s how we are going to hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate.
**So as the Mitch McConnell aligned Super PAC and National Republicans swoop in to try and flip this seat, we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $5 donation to our people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our July goal and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21&refcode=em210716-1-15?t=2&refcode2=957_6688874_PZRvy2&akid=957%2E6688874%2EPZRvy2)

$5 at a time. That’s how we are going to overcome the massive amounts of outside spending that is already pouring into this race.

Team Kelly

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: An evening in my district:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/i94OroQDNTxnTtoZl2YoFcf4IJemI3g3s35gq24ZvaU=/sKSaLrlHCm_ils7Qm-j1vLZmrlfBz4MdTP2c9iWgx8A=?refcode=blu-span-20210716-1-em&amount=25)
---
| In the constant movement that comes with my job, I sometimes have opportunities to quietly participate in the most amazing events.

This week provided such an opportunity. After a rush of important round tables and discussions with business leaders and families about recent and upcoming legislation, I spent a full evening in one of our ten counties attending the local "Valor" awards.

At the awards ceremony and dinner, local leaders recounted stories of first responders and community members who demonstrated exemplary courage in the face of danger. Volunteer firefighters who climbed into burning vehicles to extract and save passengers, police officers climbing precariously high towers to help those in crisis, and 911 operators demonstrating the extraordinary compassion and quick thought that saves lives.

Despite the unique challenges of my job -- like the onslaught of attack ads and a reelection every two years -- I love my job. I love serving the people of Virginia and this country, and I am grateful for every moment that I get to see the beauty and strength that exists in our communities.

_Abigail Spanberger_

| | **_Abigail Spanberger is running for reelection in Central Virginia. Will you support her campaign by contributing today?_**

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: RELEASE: Gibbons for Ohio Finishes Second Quarter with Most Cash on Hand in Ohio Senate Race
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KrIAetHfmQ6z-walLefRgKs8SRzRkV3P3tYZ7goMO_3qfzyNVhXsr26mxhhMDE1O1faFLOlAAz3_Xmf-LHTFB5-cwS9SNxnf08PJNjEkzrvEgQD713-r7Fr3KVus7kBzc7hnpLjONbZM_jNa36_qEA==&c=0r5TpY4iaWqYn5uibUGFSHn_diEaU3aMP2fmcH7SjdyseuaEMHShmw==&ch=ydp8O4ZX1Eshm7E2YgMCk_QlWov6YtaND8RommbCz0W_5fSMnqdPxQ==)
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: July 16, 2021
---
| Contact: Samantha Cotten scotten@gibbonsforohio.com 330-612-5920
---
| Gibbons for Ohio Finishes Second Quarter with Most Cash on Hand in Ohio Senate Race

---
| CLEVELAND, OH-- U.S. Senate candidate Mike Gibbons' campaign finished the second quarter of 2021 with the most cash on hand out of any candidate running for the open Ohio Senate seat with $5.8 million. Gibbons for Ohio also [raised more than any other candidate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KrIAetHfmQ6z-walLefRgKs8SRzRkV3P3tYZ7goMO_3qfzyNVhXsrzpZkO3nlfGk3k-CLV8CNciSKqSdWinLrnb3AKrlofsDN5wQPcOXgHsGb3-cVS2ErxNCLr9EGle3hUw4o4IQATcYTAHjkE92BYnFQxqyMo7IVSKSKO8mKUFWwKAgKMUmbQqMp0PtCV_QgNFauWcwZmv1-JAAllMRdNher6_e4McaYv5I7uriTlOUp6IhMx32h32tCjaDoTvR&c=0r5TpY4iaWqYn5uibUGFSHn_diEaU3aMP2fmcH7SjdyseuaEMHShmw==&ch=ydp8O4ZX1Eshm7E2YgMCk_QlWov6YtaND8RommbCz0W_5fSMnqdPxQ==) in the country seeking an open U.S. Senate seat bringing in $6.2 million.
---
|
---
| The Gibbons' campaign also holds 40 percent of all cash on hand out of the declared candidates that filed in the second quarter with at lease $1 million cash on hand.
---
|
---
| "Our campaign's most recent fundraising report demonstrates my commitment to serving as Ohio's next U.S. Senator," Gibbons stated. "Our campaign is well organized, well funded, and ready to make an impact in all 88 counties across the state of Ohio."
In Gibbons' 2018 bid, he received 32 percent of the vote and won 38 counties in a five way primary.
Highlights:
* $5.8 million COH
* 1552 individual donors
* 40% of all COH
* Over $200,000 raised in a single event

---
|

---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KrIAetHfmQ6z-walLefRgKs8SRzRkV3P3tYZ7goMO_3qfzyNVhXsr5gnKej7YlAH_kaoLEFdlOEKj2flkg1X7ZDg18qpDw8N9LDHLJvMwfM42OnRlI9UZ1EcbOR4DAVDnKnu7QNd9ed7h39snKHaQrsnfGHpqXtu&c=0r5TpY4iaWqYn5uibUGFSHn_diEaU3aMP2fmcH7SjdyseuaEMHShmw==&ch=ydp8O4ZX1Eshm7E2YgMCk_QlWov6YtaND8RommbCz0W_5fSMnqdPxQ==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KrIAetHfmQ6z-walLefRgKs8SRzRkV3P3tYZ7goMO_3qfzyNVhXsr26mxhhMDE1O4Ti1VrK8s-Nx5SROxBd6ok31AVXsZHTvMChX9zh9lOH2hEqnPeMAvXSG-WA_Vhfh8eGIfKb2avMsqaMc8ent3yZzEOjl5yHU&c=0r5TpY4iaWqYn5uibUGFSHn_diEaU3aMP2fmcH7SjdyseuaEMHShmw==&ch=ydp8O4ZX1Eshm7E2YgMCk_QlWov6YtaND8RommbCz0W_5fSMnqdPxQ==)

And he'll fight tooth and nail to pass our eight-point agenda for saving our democracy. = Thanks for everything you do, Team Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Peter, with the far-left in control of Washington, we’re seeing an agenda more radical than we ever imagined:

* Open borders
* Gun control
* Teaching Critical Race Theory in schools
* Out-of-control government spending

_And the list goes on and on! _

I developed a thick skin under the constant pressure of working in the White House, fname, and it taught me something important: some things are worth fighting for, no matter how tough the battle gets. That’s more true now than ever before. We need governors dedicated to fighting for our freedom.

**I’m here to tell you, as Governor I’m ready to stand strong. **

As a conservative governor, I know I will be the last line of defense against the radical left’s socialist agenda and I’m pledging to give it my all. Today, I’m hoping you’ll join me by taking my LAST LINE OF DEFENSE PLEDGE.

body:

**First:** Texas Democrats fled the state and jetted off to DC to lobby for HR 1

**Next:** Chuck Schumer held a press conference calling for a Liberal takeover of our elections

clean_body: Did you see what Texas Democrats did? | = FIRST: In a heroic move, Democrats in the Texas state legislature fled the state to block MAGA Republicans from passing horrendous voter suppression legislation. THEN: They came straight to Washington, DC to implore the Senate to do the right thing: End the filibuster and pass national voter reform. NOW: | Texas Democrats have inserted new momentum into the fight for voter reform. They’ve shown the country what true leadership looks like. But now is a critical point: Their brave act generated new press and interest in passing voter reform. If we can build enough public pressure, we could actually push the Senate over the edge! We need you on this. \-- Team Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. name: =?utf-8?Q?Matt=20Royer?=
subject: Reproductive Justice is on the ballot in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by KTBBH PAC
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us8.campaign-archive.com/?e=76fc145c69&u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=518fc2f139)
---
| | [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=e04aa7130c&e=76fc145c69)
---
| |
---
| Let's be real here, Derek

There is a reason why Glenn Youngkin doesn’t publish his policy platform. He doesn’t want you to know that he gut every reproductive protection Democrats have worked so hard to put in place. He would rather Virginia severely limit people’s rights to their own bodies. For someone who is against Big Government, he weirdly feels comfortable with the state regulating what people should do with their own bodies.

---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=28a51576c7&e=76fc145c69)
---
| Abortion is healthcare. Plan and simple. It is not always an easy choice that one wants to make but in some cases, it is a medically necessary and often times very emotional choice. And it is clear, with Glenn Youngkin in the Governor’s mansion, that the regressive and dangerous laws we see in Texas and throughout Republican held sates will come here. With the conservative leading Supreme Court looking to hear cases on Abortion and Reproductive Rights very soon, we cannot afford that.
---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=ab21c4fc51&e=76fc145c69)
---
| Proud to have stood alongside my friend and fellow AYD, PPAV Executive Director Jamie Lockhart yesterday with Democratic Party of Virginia, Planned Parenthood Advocates of Virginia, and NARAL Pro-Choice Virginia to let Youngkin know that he may hide behind vague words and limited public stances but Virginians will know the truth about his radical Right-Wing, regressive stances by November.

Vote for the Democratic ticket on November 2. We can't afford to go backwards.
---
|
In Solidarity,

Matt Royer

---

subject: Bryan Osorio, Son of the Central Valley, for CA-21!
body:
Bryan is running to flip CA-21 which was one of the 4 U.S. House seats CA Democrats lost to Republicans in 2020. Let's send Valadao packing! ✈ | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=e6ecd1bd44&e=66979298f9)
---
| | |
### **A SON OF THE CENTRAL VALLEY, FOR ALL OF US**
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=40316e33fa&e=66979298f9)
---
|
---
| **Bryan Osorio,** son of immigrants, was born in Delano, the birthplace of the labor rights movement and United Farm Worker's Union of the 1960s led by Cesar Chavez and Dolores Huerta. Inspired by the activism and the rich history of the region, Bryan knows that Central Valley deserves better than Republican hardliner, David Valadao. Bryan will fight for those who call the Central Valley home. He will fight for humane immigration policy, Medicare for all, and environmental protections for us now and future generations. He is running for his community. California's 21st Congressional District.

Bryan values the American Dream, and through the hard work and dedication of his parents he attended California's public schools, went on to receive his degree from UC Berkeley, and returned home to serve his community as council member and eventually Mayor of Delano. Bryan has championed for the working-class, has fought for immigrant rights by declaring Delano a Sanctuary City, fought for LGBTQ+ rights by designating June as Pride Month in Delano, and has fought against regressive policies that have kept the people of Delano from thriving.

---
|
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=b0ae824671&e=66979298f9)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=f2994a2486&e=66979298f9)
---
**_Bryan is running to flip CA-21 which was one of the 4 U.S. House seats Democrats lost to Republicans in 2020._**
| **WE CAN ONLY FLIP THIS SEAT WITH YOUR HELP**
Last quarter, Bryan outraised Valadao. Next time, we want to send an even stronger message to the GOP - **we will outraise you, we will outwork you, and we will do this by running a grassroots, people-powered campaign.**
[**Will you donate $10 today DIRECTLY TO BRYAN? **](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=be3952f7ec&e=66979298f9)
---
| [DONATE $10 NOW](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=e9164b7e1d&e=66979298f9 "DONATE $10 NOW")
---
| [VOLUNTEER](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=bb6367974f&e=66979298f9 "VOLUNTEER")
---
|
---
| We are proud to have Bryan as a Future Generations candidate. We endorse candidates we know have a proven record and history of standing up for the most vulnerable, for their communities, and know that with them in Congress, a vote for the progress of the people of California's 21st District, will be _**a vote for all of us.**_

We've seen that given a great progressive candidate to vote for, we can build enthusiasm and we can win and WIN BIG! We have built a nationwide coalition with organizations like Our Revolution, Sunrise Movement, Youth Climate Strike, MoveOn, and Flip the West to build our progressive bench!

**We can do** the same for Bryan and can continue to expand in some of the most critical races in California as we did for 13 Texas candidates in 2020, for Senator Markey is Massachusetts, and now Congresswoman Cori Bush in Missouri.

**We can only do** with your support. [Will you split a donation with Bryan and Future Generations?](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=3122fbb60e&e=66979298f9)
---
| [GIVE $7](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=7e834070b2&e=66979298f9 "GIVE $7")
---
| [GIVE $20.22](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=dffcc908fd&e=66979298f9 "GIVE $20.22")
---
| [GIVE OTHER](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=10e461d967&e=66979298f9 "GIVE OTHER")
---
|
---
|
### Meet Future Generations Youth Leadership
---
| |
---
_Meet Nyx Mendoza! Nyx is a local organizer in the Dallas/Fort Worth region in Texas. Nyx loans her talents of digital content creation and illustrations to support progressive candidates and organizations.

Future Generations is a youth-led, volunteer-ran organization. We are honored to have Nyx design and create our 2021/2022 graphics for Future Generations. Join us in sending a huge Thank you to Nyx!_
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=7da803d663&e=66979298f9)
---

---
| | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=4c68ecfde6&e=66979298f9)
---

**Our mailing address is:**
Future Generations PACPO BOX 362PALO PINTO, TX 76484
[Add us to your address book](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/vcard?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9c2d36475c)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/profile?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9c2d36475c&e=66979298f9&c=f2f8d12c15) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9c2d36475c&e=66979298f9&c=f2f8d12c15).

Peter, I’m committed to the people of Virginia.

**I’ve served as a Delegate in the Virginia House since 2017, and have fought for Virginians every step of the way:**

In the House of Delegates I worked to expand Medicaid. I helped pass the Equal Rights Amendment. I'm fighting to raise teacher pay. And I'm working on so much more.

Now, I’m ready to get to work as Virginia's Lt. Governor ‐‐ _but I can’t do this alone._
[**That’s why I’m personally asking you to rush $1 (or more!) to help fund this historic campaign. www.halaforvirginia.com

_Peter —Andrew here._

**_I recently sat down with experienced men and women of our law enforcement, and they told me the horror stories of what it’s like to be a cop right now. _**

_It’s more_ __political__ _than ever. It’s more_ __divisive__ _than ever. It’s more_ __dangerous__ _than ever. _

_Democrats in power are only making the situation worse as_ _**_New York’s bail reform policy has led to more violent criminals being let back on the streets._**_

_On top of that is the radical defunding Democrats are doing to police departments across the country._

_The fact that the City Police Department has to take police away from counterterrorism so they can handle other crimes, that’s a scary thought._

_Our police risk so much to defend and serve our communities; the least we can do for them is to keep the radical left off their backs —_[ _**_Peter, will you rush a few dollars to help me do that?_**_](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=622fbff2111442f8828ce9399f0487e2&_e=pZaA9RiTuooht6AR6AjsDw8q-ETELWlUjuhMXVTCO4DCESJwyH9MQFfIa_NVb_jojLHAZfjiJheuqkxL-VegSDuBPDwMk4FKVWYgOdD12--t2Aa3XumvrGAo9fmz_gW_z7DVk4Tfw0JexbER5IU6Zrl7cx1vLGlairl5a3LfBD6VT33VNUBLFT1Ct_GACRY-T5gX9S2ZgyjeQT_7UsMIiq3-aIaZuzsCkjqk3uit6nbC-IR6WQhFf3cuBXbL-AO00lKocxZsij81Hh7uLXNGG0uqMKbAZf9173Weqt0EDA_42WASseU5w2ID3WrSqk_iHtOXGMgOcZQ4IxtnIaXQvxLQ7hd58moK02I0fRtVOGGOyToShZIqYMO2OmVCamore-RbJi2_9UZKRX6ZeJGjlDFl2pqYAiDH07YNtfKji-NVqmcWHil2LHrxHTvkMTCBSbdPONLYsO-vG5AqYcXyQTSAHRbTDRpVjJ8mwd8yVO8oAfIbsDd0FPVuU7ukoAkI)

subject: I took to the airwaves

I was censored by the corporate media, but I am fighting back! In case you’ve missed it, I attempted to share the TRUTH about the damage critical race theory could do to Kansas, and the mainstream media would have none of it. I was told by the _Kansas City Star_ that they would not publish an article from me if it focused on critical race theory - even after they directly attacked me, claiming I wanted to lie to our kids about slavery and racism. They’re trying to cancel me just like critical race theory is trying to cancel America’s founding.
So, I decided to take to the airwaves. I wanted to make sure you saw my appearance on _Fox and Friends First_ yesterday morning _._ [**Watch the video here, and join our team to stand against critical race theory and the Far-Left’s woke name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Big Tech lawsuit FILED - Free speech on the line Peter
body:
Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. For almost an entire year, big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook, and Google have silenced and censored millions of conservative Americans for speaking freely or questioning the government-approved "opinions" on the coronavirus or the 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn't bad enough, we've now uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with these Big Tech corporations to de-platform and silence conservatives for raising legitimate concerns over the integrity of the 2020 election. ** ** **In other words, we 've caught big government unconstitutionally colluding with big tech to silence their political opponents...** And unless folks like you and me take immediate action to stop this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. [**That is why I am urgently asking you and every other American patriot reading this letter to contribute $35 or more to help us sue Twitter and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57954621:JBYfbMlNX:m:1:3253819041:AC5D7FC63DA25B63336AD2E7AD89BFF4:r) Let me explain... In 2018, the state government of California created the Office of Elections Cybersecurity to "educate voters" with "valid information" on election laws and procedures. And as any sensible person could predict, this office quickly devolved into a political weapon for censorship by the far-left Secretary of State's Office. The reason I mention this is because this past February, conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O'Handley logged onto Twitter when he found that he had been banned from Twitter for violating the governments "rules about election integrity". [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57954621:JBYfbMlNX:m:1:3253819041:AC5D7FC63DA25B63336AD2E7AD89BFF4:r) You see, from November 2020 to February 2021, Rogan tweeted a series of messages expressing his concerns over the dubious presidential election procedures and skepticism over the results. And every time he made a statement that was deemed a "violation", it was promptly removed from Twitter. But that is not the worst of it... Recently, documents were found showing that leftist operatives within the Election Cybersecurity office flagged Rogan's tweets as "misinformation" and coded it as an "orange" level threat indicating problematic speech. _**Then it happened ...**_ After Rogan dared to question the legitimacy of the number of votes Joe Biden received during the election, Twitter permanently suspended Rogan altogether. Hopefully I don't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs and opinions is a gross violation of our freedom of speech. But Rogan's Twitter account was wildly popular and followed by more than four hundred thousand people. So, it was clear that the only reason his account was suspended was because left was worried that Rogan's tweets could damage Joe Biden's image. In fact, Rogan's opinions didn't just threaten the image of Joe Biden. The liberal elites responsible for de-platforming Rogan were also worries that his tweets would destroy the image of then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla - _who at the time was being considered to fill Kamala Harris ' vacated Senate seat. _ It's doesn't take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between big government and big tech to silence political opponents is corrupt and wildly unconstitutional. **And that 's why me and my team of superb constitutional lawyers are suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault on the First Amendment. ** ** ** [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57954621:JBYfbMlNX:m:1:3253819041:AC5D7FC63DA25B63336AD2E7AD89BFF4:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I founded the Center for American Liberty to defend our constitutionally guaranteed civil liberties from the corporations, politicians, socialist revolutionaries, and inept or bias government officials who try to infringe them. But I'll be honest with you, I never thought the assault on our individual rights would become this bad. Not only are we suing Twitter - a multi-billion-dollar corporation - for their gross infringement on Rogan's First Amendment right to free speech... We are simultaneously taking on the former-Secretary of State of California Alex Padilla for blatantly colluding with Twitter to silence conservative Americans for sharing their political opinions. **And even though we intend to win, this will be the hardest legal battle we 've ever fought.** You see, as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the help of like-minded conservative patriots like yourself. _ _ _And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000._ _ _ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a one-time contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57954621:JBYfbMlNX:m:1:3253819041:AC5D7FC63DA25B63336AD2E7AD89BFF4:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, corporations, and government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still the master of our own lives? [**I hope you join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing any amount to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57954621:JBYfbMlNX:m:1:3253819041:AC5D7FC63DA25B63336AD2E7AD89BFF4:r) Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures lambasted President Trump for the completely bogus allegations that he colluded with a foreign power to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech billionaires to influence the 2020 election, those same leftists are completely silent. I don't know about you, but I am fed up with the left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and flagrant unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57954621:JBYfbMlNX:m:1:3253819041:AC5D7FC63DA25B63336AD2E7AD89BFF4:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57954621:JBYfbMlNX:m:1:3253819041:AC5D7FC63DA25B63336AD2E7AD89BFF4:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57954621:JBYfbMlNX:m:1:3253819041:AC5D7FC63DA25B63336AD2E7AD89BFF4:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57954621:JBYfbMlNX:m:1:3253819041:AC5D7FC63DA25B63336AD2E7AD89BFF4:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57954622:JBYfbMlNX:m:1:3253819041:AC5D7FC63DA25B63336AD2E7AD89BFF4:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

| Dear Patriot a government that operates in secret is a threat to our Republic. That's why I'm calling for an investigation of the NSA -- because you have a right to know what they are doing! _Last week, I wrote a letter to the Director of the NSA demanding answers about their alleged attack on Tucker Carlson's Fourth Amendment rights._ Lawless spy agencies are a grave threat to American liberty, and I won't stand for their attacks on the Constitution.
---
|
---
| ******Here are the questions I asked in the letter:**
1. Has Tucker Carlson ever been an NSA target or has the NSA incidentally collected his electronic communications relating to his pursuit of interviewing Vladimir Putin?
2. Has the NSA, for any reason and in any manner, obtained Tucker Carlson's electronic communications relating to his attempt to interview Vladimir Putin?
3. Did the NSA comply with federal law requiring the use of minimization procedures when conducting surveillance to protect U.S. persons' identity?
4. If Tucker Carlson was indeed unmasked, what was the lawful justification for his unmasking?
5. Will you investigate whether Mr. Carlson's allegations are true and if there was a leak of Mr. Carlson's emails to other reporters or news organizations?
6. Are you committed to bringing the leaker or leakers to justice?

---
|
---
| **** This is a fight so important that I had to take it on. I had no choice -- the Constitution is at stake. I'm taking on some of the most powerful people in America. _As Chuck Schumer said, “You take on the intelligence community? They have six ways from Sunday of getting back at you."_ I've been taking on the intelligence community and their abuses of power for years. It hasn't been an easy fight. And they surely won't be happy by this stand that I’m taking. That's why I need patriotic conservatives across America to guard my back. [Will you chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help me stand up to this powerful agency?](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DdMzK_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7rVvAagGWyfRyfq1FpFNMpi-2F4nLfEmZaiBvl6gDbKvQ0cbvrl94dZhWU0IMekoxnCO8zWyA-2FOJwGa6fYmN1ZlYZmkkAZQVTZClnEwbesuj7YGo9whXx0gFVigJ-2BaQyGl88ohPQ6AS-2F8O-2BuOgcOe4PCN99yxDa8HEYxA7VtiBLcDa5xR9YyiZzPqaYT4Nylx6gxkAR5Uc9yi6HSIVVdDu9d0tLWjQFPLIMKeplhd11Nf8iV7m9yuLxBUe1I-2B-2BS34kHMFfKc4KT5JhkE1yTtEoz8fsr9fSdYAfV-2FKth-2B8xUBnU40v43qYyRFDhxGCiGrJe-2BrisDMlnFDPMhtCiRcolv2g-3D-3D) America has drifted so far from what the Founding Fathers envisioned. If they saw the kind of secret spy agencies that we have today, and the enormous power that they wield, they would be horrified.
It is a terrible thing for democracy. That's why I'm stepping up and taking them on, no matter how difficult it might be. But they are very, very powerful. And although I have a voice in the U.S. Senate, I'm just one man. I need patriotic Americans everywhere to stand with me. Will you be one of those people? [I can't take on the NSA alone -- I need your help. name: Larry Elder
subject: What happened to the California dream, Peter?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57954778:J9v9lMl-N:m:1:3253819041:F4B76A458EF6413010DA12D968931214:r)

---
Peter,

My name is Larry Elder and I'm a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I'm a proud Californian.

But I can't stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - **which is why I 'm announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election!**

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57954778:J9v9lMl-N:m:1:3253819041:F4B76A458EF6413010DA12D968931214:r)
My high school-dropout father worked TWO full time jobs as a janitor in Los Angeles. But he was a hard worker, he saved his nickels and dimes until he could buy us a house in South Central Los Angeles.

At that time, **this was the American dream and California was where people came to achieve it.** Now, our over-reaching, leftist dominated government has made this dream nearly **impossible to achieve.**

Today's California is a sad state of affairs. **Our taxes are rising almost as fast as our crime rates, and our homeless population accounts for 25% of the whole country 's and only is growing under a Democrat dominated government.** [**We must end the Democrats ' full control of our state before it's too late, Peter. Can I count in you to help me do that?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57954778:J9v9lMl-N:m:1:3253819041:F4B76A458EF6413010DA12D968931214:r)

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57954778:J9v9lMl-N:m:1:3253819041:F4B76A458EF6413010DA12D968931214:r)
Enough is enough, and I refuse to watch while Gavin Newsom ruins our state with abusive executive order after executive order. His draconian control has gone too far!

During the pandemic, he dined for $35,000 at the French Laundry without a mask with the same health officials and lobbyists that imposed the shutdown! **Meanwhile businesses he didn 't frequent weren't allowed to stay open. He shut down in-school learning while his own children enjoyed the luxury of private in-school instruction.**

I'm absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom's failed Democrat-led dictatorship. **Our businesses should be open, our schools should be open. Opportunity doesn 't come from prolonged covid stimulus that should have ended months ago. It is forged in a thriving and free economy and top-notch schools - neither of which exists in California under Newsom.**

Peter, I know that I have what it takes to restore California to its former state of bountiful opportunity, but I'm going to need you on my team every step of the way. With only a short amount of time remaining until the election, [**will you join my team?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57954778:J9v9lMl-N:m:1:3253819041:F4B76A458EF6413010DA12D968931214:r)

[**California is in desperate need of strong, common-sense conservative leadership right now and I 'm willing to step up to the plate to help stop Gavin Newsom from further destroying California. Are you with me?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57954778:J9v9lMl-N:m:1:3253819041:F4B76A458EF6413010DA12D968931214:r)

Thank you,

Larry Elder

clean_body: | Peter, My name is Larry Elder and I'm a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I'm a proud Californian. But I can't stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - which is why I 'm announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election! My high school-dropout father worked TWO full time jobs as a janitor in Los Angeles. But he was a hard worker, he saved his nickels and dimes until he could buy us a house in South Central Los Angeles. At that time, this was the American dream and California was where people came to achieve it. Now, our over-reaching, leftist dominated government has made this dream nearly impossible to achieve. Today's California is a sad state of affairs. Our taxes are rising almost as fast as our crime rates, and our homeless population accounts for 25% of the whole country 's and only is growing under a Democrat dominated government. Enough is enough, and I refuse to watch while Gavin Newsom ruins our state with abusive executive order after executive order. His draconian control has gone too far! During the pandemic, he dined for $35,000 at the French Laundry without a mask with the same health officials and lobbyists that imposed the shutdown! Meanwhile businesses he didn 't frequent weren't allowed to stay open. He shut down in-school learning while his own children enjoyed the luxury of private in-school instruction. I'm absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom's failed Democrat-led dictatorship. Our businesses should be open, our schools should be open. Opportunity doesn 't come from prolonged covid stimulus that should have ended months ago. It is forged in a thriving and free economy and top-notch schools - neither of which exists in California under Newsom. Peter, I know that I have what it takes to restore California to its former state of bountiful opportunity, but I'm going to need you on my team every step of the way. With only a short amount of time remaining until the election, Thank you, Larry Elder | | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? | **Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Noteworthy News_**** _NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans****NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
---
|
---
| **Dear ****Derek,**

**Last week we heard Governor Sununu call for local activists to play a more direct role in spreading information on our Republican-lead milestones and achievements here in New Hampshire - this week we saw the successful results of that campaign! Countless letters have been submitted over the course of a week and a half from Republicans across the state, and conservatives are stepping up! Since the budget's official passing, we’ve witnessed NH Democrats attempt to undermine our progress by using inaccurate rhetoric and unfounded theories to spread misinformation. I’m happy to say that because of our efforts, Granite Staters are getting access to the facts and are being provided with accurate information to combat any false liberal narratives. But this fight is never ending, and we will need new activists to step up in this endeavor every month in order to have long lasting success. If you’re willing to play a part, fill out this** _****_[**_google form_**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fdocs.google.com%2Fforms%2Fd%2Fe%2F1FAIpQLSfrOtBceK2VB9GrzHzLLu4jep0lPxTkqGqCazYG_EApuAmVjw%2Fviewform%3Fvc=0%26c=0%26w=1%26flr=0/1/0100017ab110e68c-a629438e-d7b3-4804-bad1-ff21ceb88381-000000/mkyscKECwScfaf9PwtajYIeOkHE=227)**so that we can provide you with resources and assistance! ****

I would also like to give a shout out to the Londonderry Republican Committee to their successful Family Pig Roast Fundraiser held this past week! Their Chairwoman Liz Thomas did a splendid job engaging volunteers and making sure the event ran smoothly. Guests had the opportunity to hear from local Republican leaders including Senate President Chuck Morse, Senator Kelly Ayotte, Ambassador Scott Brown, and Commissioner Frank Edelblut while enjoying delicious Cuban-style pig roasted by Rep. José Cambrils! Great work from a great town committee!

****If you missed out on the LRC event, be sure to sign up for one of the upcoming events in the weeks to come, like our NHGOP event with**[** _Tommy Hicks at Labelle Winery_**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fevents.nh.gop%2Fevent%2Fnight-at-the-winery-with-rnc-co-chair-tommy-hicks%2F/1/0100017ab110e68c-a629438e-d7b3-4804-bad1-ff21ceb88381-000000/isHwY1mT7hKH49kRtrGALBOyEdE=227)**THIS Saturday! Located on a beautiful hillside winery, this gorgeous venue is accompanied by delicious hor d'erves and locally produced wine - it’s an event you won’t want to miss! Get your tickets today as we will sell out at the door!**

---
---
| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **

| **
****Concord, NH – Speaker Sherman Packard (R-Londonderry) released the following statement after Biden Administration mentions door-to-door campaign targeted at unvaccinated Americans:
**
**_“This type of political strong-arm tactic would not be well received by citizens of the Granite State. Legislators in New Hampshire will continue the fight to protect patients’ privacy and fight against federal overreach. We are well on our way to getting families and businesses back on track. Vaccines are available to those wishing to get vaccinated, and this idea of going door-to-door to private homes is not something we would ever consider or welcome here.”_**

**
****Leader Osborne ****Statement**** on President Biden’s Vaccine Tactics**
___**“The Biden Administration has made it abundantly clear that they are not shy about intruding on Americans' right to medical privacy. The President’s call to begin targeting the doors of unvaccinated individuals is yet another reminder that this administration will trample our liberties if left unchecked. The Republican caucus remains committed to continuing our work to strengthen medical freedom and preserve privacy rights in New Hampshire. Granite Staters exercising their right to refuse a medical treatment should not be subject to an intimidation campaign at their doorstep. When the government tries to intrude on our households, it is up to us to slam the door in their face.”**_**
**

| **The New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans is the officially chartered state organization for College Republicans all over the state of New Hampshire. With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. **

Countless letters have been submitted over the course of a week and a half from Republicans across the state, and conservatives are stepping up! Since the budget's official passing, we’ve witnessed NH Democrats attempt to undermine our progress by using inaccurate rhetoric and unfounded theories to spread misinformation. I’m happy to say that because of our efforts, Granite Staters are getting access to the facts and are being provided with accurate information to combat any false liberal narratives. But this fight is never ending, and we will need new activists to step up in this endeavor every month in order to have long lasting success. name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, Another busy week on the campaign trail is in the books! Jane continued traveling the state spreading her America First message directly to Ohio primary voters and posted a strong second quarter fundraising report. As the campaign continues through the summer, Jane will continue to work hard to gain the support of Ohio voters, just like she will fight hard for you in the U.S. Senate. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Election Integrity and Accountability** Despite [55% of Americans](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=2cdbded3746844a09a9d29ff5dfbaccc&_e=KsJsIi8gWyEfE05-zc6U4Ur1LUD4lrxsQcKV4J97FP-SA86gDSl7VJspxdqGe5unw-O-vLbegFUT60L7sZiARNnIPmE0Q5AHYXCex4RAhyls8NMEMeQutP8TbxoaLefVaRMYx4YJzKVRyrFg4rwas6Qa2XemGiFAbJBYsqsHsQPqdn0dBUCXWpiJPrdtnLpkIB-3SRCS2GpbB1heEDLpi1xhaOlZeT-Arrd6Lv7pwTpYmItXWN__VjXbc1E-wcb-bXxLDybVd8xuVV_fHbwYGLzgI8c0heuiXkf37NteTEnl6nBrAYDkLEw8EHgaTjb6prb-YYRoG0mCtFA3Go75VrxUp5p08Dgzoo0DjWN4hAWEmkwq4Rx63JpIksj7yOEh-zoTwyJhAEgKLDhZGcU0Jw%3D%3D) supporting forensic audits of election results to ensure there was no fraud in 2020, Democrats and the media are making a concerted effort to smother any talk of the 2020 election. These policies would end coal-fired power plant use and reduce natural gas usage by 50% in a very short period of time. This would be especially detrimental to West Virginia, as our state is almost entirely powered by coal-fired power plants.
Meanwhile, China is building a massive new fleet of coal-fired power plants in an effort to become the dominant energy exporter in the world.
We need to fight these PRICE-HIKING and JOB-KILLING actions. Tens of thousands of blue collar jobs will not survive this.

clean_body: | | | | Far-left Democrat's have snuck in this bill Biden's disastrous Clean Energy Standards. Dear Peter, Last night, I appeared on Laura Ingraham’s prime time show to discuss the “Bernie” Biden radical, $3.5 trillion reconciliation pork-bill. Far-left Democrats are trying to hide Biden's disastrous and job-killing carbon tax provisions in this bill. These policies would end coal-fired power plant use and reduce natural gas usage by 50% in a very short period of time. This would be especially detrimental to West Virginia, as our state is almost entirely powered by coal-fired power plants. Meanwhile, China is building a massive new fleet of coal-fired power plants in an effort to become the dominant energy exporter in the world. We need to fight these PRICE-HIKING and JOB-KILLING actions. Tens of thousands of blue collar jobs will not survive this. | | | | | | | | We are also asking Senator Manchin to hold the line by voting against this devastating bill for West Virginia. Thanks for anything you are willing to do to help. I will never stop fighting for West Virginia and America. Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey Attorney General of West Virginia | Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9730559b43e44563b478688b8b71f4a5&_e=6jKFlAmhMg0a9g5mkPJOS8SfhZTft9_UOldGEOHpfw9ySDI7L1hkLSAhWsEBiu45pOZmtGAvHeCr3K2Js_hZkXuyRvsWcIYWbdC-6yO8fYAPcSqscqTEdxHwHPJhg1hu0aWIQrr7OsYQN-ZGZ7k5l6ofr_5fL4cFgpyWmGe50QbklaEV77U_27VaIAUflD3plftF5FH0z52e6K9T1-98L6i1hM1C0y8XAsM2wl1BI7ndsVRze-pbUDB2kDP0Ik93uS5OxNcC4SurtCSSLBnmO-3nO8uM5GsHb8TQY62B12g%3D) **Communism Is Evil. Period. 🙅** [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9730559b43e44563b478688b8b71f4a5&_e=6jKFlAmhMg0a9g5mkPJOS8SfhZTft9_UOldGEOHpfw9ySDI7L1hkLSAhWsEBiu45pOZmtGAvHeCr3K2Js_hZkVYo6uFz2wePffbgsmJMvZCM8LriHzQrkQfea_JVPvO7c6INT78-yr0mTWfTFHRH9OVJ0Grw_oH_hdgfwh1fdeSQZejthjxG6RzIrfIoSg3qmEoqwXh29_k3ke0dk3E6KB6EiteFpJQN41X-y2jBSEDkXaC6kQM-OS0H9Xu5uplg2Q19A42trJTrLQr_jlCLD0CY5UyGfLfwT3X85suwb7Q%3D) **Watch me discuss the Biden administration’s lack of support for the Cuban people on Newsmax 👆** Communism never works, and the latest protests in Cuba prove that. Thousands of Cubans took to the streets of Havana this week to say they’ve had enough. For too long, their tyrannical leaders crushed their freedom, killed and imprisoned dissenters, and controlled their daily lives. These are the [largest](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9730559b43e44563b478688b8b71f4a5&_e=6jKFlAmhMg0a9g5mkPJOSxOiPnJSuB2c7W999X3ivr27dBWZYL2mTpGb-h8zkXV7NhP4PxVk-17SyOP3wAXPXmRq79XoMBvPpMRT8fVySO8QCtTKRQ6g5AreFcm1iY9tR7jn-9JTs6nYp9lel57hejbq4LXPxhp5kzCTr1VIdLPW7OozdGfotRbKDBR-Lw4poOP2qMUagnG1ONkYJbtALksaXUu06Gtlm6V6BkaXilq7BaVtBxCqkMh83mPdlj-tyoeDEkXCg_dmOCDn0q5mzi4KgqpmRBt1LybWlp4Pwgw_AdeE6mHLiy6BvVZ9tD_l) protests the island has seen in decades. Clearly, Cubans are ready for a change. They are ready for FREEDOM. But here’s the kicker: Liberals are actually DEFENDING the communist government in Cuba and BLAMING America. Turns out, BLM leaders [actually praised](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9730559b43e44563b478688b8b71f4a5&_e=6jKFlAmhMg0a9g5mkPJOSzwETYZCF2wdm4KkSUFpAA3R0ixYRjPLw0oHs9EIjoBzh6pqy6WmhjzGyJyfdIU1n2smpoPqivXh52YiK6EmetCzdbABLPM3OQcrdcg3GnFayAJRW-5_mkKpghhNyietKVYNyzjviorpgdYer50XQ-E5M9dpoQRJhmjc4zPBMWSIywAv2WXTcSZX5bqBcZ_y-OXn1z8snETPu43Qbg5jOX7ys3d94uTM3XxXvs9wkbEhfbaOt3uDz6HDqNBs6qKYx4DXxJV5IfsIhDg4lDHN9-2gf-1BvF3ePED4oySZ51u5) Fidel Castro when he died.
